You are the first person to show up when someone is in crisis, armed with a plan and perhaps a very expensive bottle of wine. Your growth comes from learning that you are worthy of love even when you aren't being perfect.
characters.short_description: You are a high-achieving, meticulously groomed perfectionist who masks deep-seated insecurities with bravado and luxury.

characters.name: Winston Bishop
characters.profile_text: You are a true original, possessing a sense of humor and a worldview that no one else quite understands. Whether you are getting overly invested in a jigsaw puzzle or talking to your cat like a human, you embrace your oddities with total confidence. You have a knack for finding joy in the absurd and are often the person who brings a much-needed sense of levity to stressful situations. Your main struggle is finding your footing in a world that demands conventionality. You might feel like a late bloomer, cycling through different careers and hobbies before finding your true calling. Your pranks are either way too small or way too big, reflecting a personality that doesn't always know where the normal line is. Ultimately, your kindness and your ability to be unapologetically yourself make you a refreshing presence in any room.
characters.short_description: You are a delightfully eccentric individual who marches to the beat of your own drum, often accompanied by a cat and a questionable prank.

characters.name: Cece Parekh
characters.profile_text: You often serve as the voice of reason in a room full of chaos, possessing a sharp wit and a no-nonsense attitude. While you might have started out as the cool one who kept people at a distance, you have grown into a person who isn't afraid to show vulnerability or fight for what you want. You are incredibly loyal, especially to those you have known since childhood, and you will go to bat for your friends without a second thought. Your pitfalls often involve a fear of being seen as just a pretty face, which can lead you to be overly defensive or hesitant to take risks in your professional life. You sometimes struggle with making big decisions, worrying about the long-term consequences of your choices. However, your resilience is unmatched, and you have a remarkable ability to reinvent yourself and thrive in new environments while keeping your core values intact.
characters.short_description: You are a grounded, fiercely protective friend who balances a cool exterior with a deeply supportive and resilient spirit.

options.text: I attempt a 'MacGyver' fix using duct tape, gum, or whatever is nearby, even if it's not up to code.
I call a high-end professional immediately; I cannot function in an environment that isn't pristine.
I try to turn the repair into a fun DIY project or cover the eyesore with something handmade and colorful.
I probably won't notice it for days because I am deeply focused on a hobby, like a complex jigsaw puzzle.
I assess the situation calmly and tell my roommates exactly who needs to fix it and by when.

questions.text: How do you typically handle a broken appliance or a leaky faucet in your home?

options.text: The emotional glue and cheerleader who organizes every birthday and holiday event.
The cynical but fiercely loyal one who provides the reality checks and the beer.
The high-energy provider who plans the logistics and ensures everyone looks their best.
The eccentric wild card who brings the weirdest stories and the most unique perspective.
The grounded protector who keeps the group from spiraling into total chaos.

questions.text: What is your primary role within your closest circle of friends?

options.text: I burst into spontaneous song or have a very public, very quirky emotional breakdown.
I engage in a 'panic moonwalk' or hide under the covers in my favorite old hoodie.
I become hyper-fixated on cleaning, grooming, or my personal brand to regain control.
I get 'too weird' and start talking to my pets or committing to a bizarre, nonsensical prank.
I get quiet and defensive, using sarcasm to keep people at a distance until I've processed it.

questions.text: When you are feeling extremely stressed, how does that manifest?

options.text: A vintage sewing machine and a collection of colorful, patterned fabrics.
A half-finished novel stashed in a box under the bed alongside some unpaid bills.
A custom-tailored suit and a refrigerator stocked with artisanal, small-batch cheeses.
A very pampered cat and a closet full of increasingly loud bird-print shirts.
A high-quality leather jacket and a phone full of contacts for the city's best spots.

questions.text: Which of these would be your most prized possession in the loft?

options.text: I want to follow my heart and make a difference, even if it means being a bit unconventional.
I'm a late bloomer who is still trying out different versions of myself to see what sticks.
I am driven to reach the top of the corporate ladder and earn the status I deserve.
I find the whole concept exhausting and would rather just get by with the bare minimum.
I am resilient and practical, willing to reinvent myself as many times as it takes to thrive.

questions.text: What is your honest philosophy regarding 'adulting' and career success?

body.summary: Are you the adorkable heart of the group or the self-proclaimed marketing genius with a permanent spot in the douchebag jar? It's time to find out which member of the 4D loft truly matches your chaotic energy and unique life philosophy. Grab your driving moccasins and get ready to play a game of True American to discover your inner roommate.
body.title: Which 'New Girl' Loft Roommate Are You?

topic.display_name: Which Loft Roommate Are You?

characters.name: Jeff Winger
characters.profile_text:
You possess a natural magnetism that draws people toward you, often finding yourself in a position of leadership whether you asked for it or not. Your sharp tongue and defensive sarcasm are tools you use to keep the world at arm's length, protecting a vulnerability you rarely admit to. While you might claim to be motivated only by self-interest and the desire to do the least amount of work possible, your actions frequently reveal a deep-seated loyalty to those you consider your inner circle. You are the master of the stirring speech, able to fix almost any social disaster with a few well-chosen words.

Your struggles often involve the fear of failure and the pressure of maintaining a perfect image, which can lead to vanity or emotional detachment. You may find it difficult to be sincere because you are afraid of being judged, but your growth lies in realizing that your worth isn't tied to your professional status or your looks. When the stakes are high, you are the one who rallies the group, using your gift for oratory to remind everyone why they belong together. You are a protector at heart, even if you prefer to do it while wearing an expensive suit.
characters.short_description: You are the charismatic, cynical leader who uses your wit and charm to navigate life while secretly caring for your friends.

characters.name: Britta Perry
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by your fierce commitment to your principles and your desire to make the world a better place, even if your methods are often misguided or overly dramatic. You aren't afraid to stand up for the underdog, though your tendency to over-intellectualize emotions can sometimes alienate the people you are trying to help. Despite being the frequent target of jokes, your resilience is your greatest strength; you keep trying to do the right thing regardless of how many times you "Britta" the situation. You have a heart of gold and a stubborn streak that ensures you never back down from a fight you believe in.

Your pitfalls often involve a lack of self-awareness and a desperate need to be seen as rebellious or non-conformist. You may find yourself stuck in a cycle of self-sabotage because you are afraid of actually succeeding and losing your identity as an outsider. Beneath the layers of protest signs and psychological jargon, you are a deeply empathetic person who provides a necessary moral compass for your friends. You are the person who will always be there to offer support, even if that support comes with a side of unsolicited and slightly inaccurate therapy.
characters.short_description: You are the passionate activist and resilient underdog who cares deeply about social justice despite your frequent clumsy execution.

characters.name: Abed Nadir
characters.profile_text:
You navigate the complexities of human interaction by mapping them onto familiar tropes and cinematic structures, providing you with a unique perspective that others often miss. Your detachment isn't a lack of feeling but rather a different way of processing reality, allowing you to remain calm and analytical when things descend into chaos. You value consistency and tradition, often acting as the glue that holds your social group together by documenting your shared history and predicting the narrative arcs of your lives. Your imagination is your greatest asset, turning the mundane halls of Greendale into scenes from an action movie or a sci-fi epic.

While your commitment to your imagination is a source of great creativity, it can sometimes make it difficult for you to connect with people on a purely emotional level without a script. You might struggle when life doesn't follow a logical plotline or when your friends don't play their expected roles. Nevertheless, your honesty and unwavering loyalty make you an indispensable friend. You remind everyone that life is better when you embrace the meta-commentary and find the magic in the mundane, proving that being different is actually your superpower.
characters.short_description: You are the observant, pop-culture-obsessed visionary who views life through the lens of film and television to make sense of the world.

characters.name: Troy Barnes
characters.profile_text:
You have undergone a significant transformation, moving away from the pressures of being a high school star to embrace a life filled with wonder, playfulness, and deep friendship. Your innocence and sensitivity are your most endearing qualities, allowing you to find joy in the simplest things, from blanket forts to elaborate secret handshakes. You are incredibly loyal, particularly to those who see the real you, and you possess a hidden mechanical talent that often saves the day when things get technical. You are the heart of your duo, bringing a sense of warmth and sincerity to every adventure.

Your main challenge is a tendency to be easily influenced by others and a lingering insecurity about your own intelligence or maturity. You sometimes look for a leader to follow because you are afraid of the responsibility that comes with making your own path. However, as you grow, you discover that your kindness and emotional intelligence are forms of strength that make you a natural leader in your own right. You are the person who teaches others that it is okay to grow up without losing your sense of play, and that being a "true repairman" means fixing more than just air conditioners.
characters.short_description: You are the pure-hearted, imaginative former athlete who has traded social status for the joy of being your authentic, nerdy self.

characters.name: Annie Edison
characters.profile_text:
You are the engine that keeps things running, armed with color-coded binders and a relentless work ethic that puts everyone else to shame. Your ambition is matched only by your attention to detail, and you often find yourself taking on the role of the responsible one in your group. You have a strong sense of justice and a need for validation, which can sometimes manifest as being high-strung or overly competitive when your goals are threatened. You are the person who ensures that every project is finished on time and every rule is followed, even when your friends are trying to slack off.

Your pitfalls include a tendency to spiral when things don't go according to plan and a habit of judging others by your own impossibly high standards. You may struggle to let go of control and simply enjoy the moment without worrying about the future or your reputation. Despite this, your evolution involves learning that you are more than your accomplishments. Your fierce protectiveness of your friends and your ability to see the potential in every situation make you the heart of any team you join. You are a powerhouse of competence who is slowly learning that it is okay to be messy sometimes.
characters.short_description: You are the driven, organized overachiever whose perfectionism and sharp intellect are fueled by a desire to prove your worth.

characters.name: Shirley Bennett
characters.profile_text:
You often take on the role of the caregiver, offering baked goods and motherly advice to those around you, but beneath that pleasant demeanor lies a woman of incredible strength and occasional intimidation. Your faith and family are the pillars of your life, providing you with a clear set of values that you aren't afraid to defend. You are a savvy entrepreneur with a talent for organization and a keen eye for social dynamics, often knowing exactly what is going on with everyone before they even realize it themselves. You are the moral anchor of the group, even if your methods are sometimes a bit forceful.

Your challenges often stem from a tendency to be passive-aggressive or judgmental when others don't share your worldview or lifestyle. You might use guilt as a tool to keep people in line, which can create tension in your closest relationships. However, your capacity for forgiveness and your genuine desire to see your loved ones succeed make you a powerful ally. You are the one who reminds the group of the importance of community and the enduring power of kindness. When things get tough, you are the first one to step up and take care of business, proving that being "nice" doesn't mean being weak.
characters.short_description: You are the nurturing, formidable matriarch who balances a sweet exterior with a sharp business sense and strong personal convictions.

options.text: Deliver a charismatic, stirring speech to rally the troops.
Create a color-coded schedule and take over the organization.
Step back and analyze the situation as if it were a television plot.
Offer everyone snacks and try to keep the peace with kindness.
Passionately protest the unfairness of the workload or the system.
Look to my best friend and follow their lead on what to do next.

questions.text: When a group project starts to descend into chaos, what is your natural response?

options.text: Maintaining a successful image and being respected by others.
Achieving perfection and proving my worth through hard work.
Understanding the world through my specific interests and hobbies.
Supporting my family and upholding my personal convictions.
Fighting for social justice and standing up for the underdog.
Finding joy in playfulness and being a loyal, supportive friend.

questions.text: What is the most important factor in your personal motivation?

options.text: Use sharp wit and sarcasm to keep the situation from getting too heavy.
Get high-strung and try to resolve the issue with logic and over-explaining.
Remain emotionally detached and observe the 'tropes' of the argument.
Use a bit of guilt or moral authority to show them where they went wrong.
Get defensive and loud about my principles, even if it's awkward.
Try to turn the tension into a game or retreat into my imagination.

questions.text: How do you typically handle interpersonal conflict with a close friend?

options.text: Relaxing at a high-end lounge or getting a luxury spa treatment.
Organizing my living space or getting ahead on my to-do list.
Having a marathon of my favorite movie franchise with a friend.
Hosting a dinner for loved ones and catching up on community news.
Attending a rally or volunteering for a cause I believe in.
Building an elaborate blanket fort or playing video games.

questions.text: Which of these activities best describes your ideal way to spend a Saturday?

options.text: A fear of vulnerability and a tendency toward vanity.
A need for constant validation and a struggle with perfectionism.
Difficulty connecting with others without using a script or reference.
A tendency to be judgmental or passive-aggressive when stressed.
A habit of self-sabotage or being seen as a 'buzzkill' by others.
Insecurity about my own maturity or being too easily influenced.

questions.text: Which of these personal challenges do you find most difficult to overcome?

body.summary: Welcome to Greendale Community College, where the lessons are weird and the friendships are even weirder. Are you the charismatic leader with a hidden heart or the pop-culture savant who sees life through a lens? Take this quiz to find out which member of the most dysfunctional study group in history matches your personality.
body.title: Which Member Of The Greendale Study Group Are You?

topic.display_name: Which Greendale Study Group Member Are You?

characters.name: Michael Bluth
characters.profile_text:
You often find yourself as the only adult in the room, burdened by the weight of everyone else's incompetence and poor decisions. You pride yourself on your moral compass and your commitment to family, even when that family seems determined to drive you insane. Your life is a series of difficult choices, yet you keep coming back because you believe you are the only one who can fix things. You are hardworking and pragmatic, but your biggest pitfall is your own sense of superiority and the need to be the hero in every situation.

You value structure and logic, often feeling like the protagonist in a tragedy of errors. While you claim to want to leave and start a new life, your deep-seated need for validation keeps you tethered to the chaos. You are a good son to a fault, often overlooking your own flaws while meticulously cataloging the failings of others. Your strength lies in your resilience, but you must learn that you cannot control everything, no matter how hard you try.
characters.short_description: You are the responsible, self-sacrificing glue that desperately tries to keep your dysfunctional family from falling apart.

characters.name: Lucille Bluth
characters.profile_text:
You have a taste for the finer things in life and very little patience for anyone who cannot provide them. Your wit is as dry as your martinis, and you use it to maintain control over your children, whom you view as both disappointments and essential accessories. You are a master of the backhanded compliment and the strategic guilt trip, ensuring that everyone knows exactly where they stand in your hierarchy. Your strengths lie in your unwavering confidence and your ability to navigate high-society politics with ease.

However, your emotional distance and reliance on material wealth often leave you isolated, even if you would never admit to feeling lonely. You view the world through a lens of extreme privilege and are often baffled by the struggles of common people. Your primary motivation is self-preservation and maintaining the status quo, no matter the cost to those around you. You are the ultimate survivor, as long as there is a waiter nearby to refill your glass.
characters.short_description: You are the sharp-tongued, martini-clutching matriarch who rules your social circle with a mix of cold indifference and calculated manipulation.

characters.name: Gob Bluth
characters.profile_text:
You live for the spotlight and the validation of others, even if you have to resort to tricks—excuse me, illusions—to get it. You are constantly seeking the approval of a father figure who barely notices you, leading to a cycle of grand gestures and spectacular failures. Your confidence is often a thin veneer over a well of desperation, and you have a knack for making impulsive decisions that lead to immediate regret. Despite your many blunders, your resilience and commitment to your craft are strangely admirable.

You are often the life of the party, provided the party is about you. Your social interactions are frequently transactional or performative, as you struggle to form genuine connections. You possess a certain chaotic energy that keeps life interesting, but your inability to take responsibility for your actions often leaves you in a state of perpetual confusion. You are a man of many mistakes, but you always manage to find a way to make an entrance, usually with a dramatic musical cue.
characters.short_description: You are a flamboyant, attention-seeking performer who masks deep-seated insecurities with elaborate illusions and expensive Segways.

characters.name: Lindsay Bluth Fünke
characters.profile_text:
You often find yourself championing causes not because you believe in them, but because they make you look good or annoy your mother. You are deeply concerned with your image and your status, yet you frequently rebel against the very structures that support your lifestyle. Your marriage is a complex dance of mutual misunderstanding, and you often seek validation through external flirtations or superficial self-improvement projects. You are charming and adaptable, but you struggle with a lack of direction and a tendency to abandon projects as soon as they require real effort.

Your strengths include your ability to reinvent yourself and your refusal to be ignored. However, your vanity often blinds you to the needs of those closest to you, including your own daughter. You are a creature of impulse, driven by a need to feel special and important in a family that often overlooks your contributions. You want to change the world, but you would prefer to do it while wearing designer clothes and attending a high-end gala.
characters.short_description: You are a socially conscious socialite who balances a desire for activism with an undeniable craving for luxury and vanity.

characters.name: Tobias Fünke
characters.profile_text:
You possess a unique ability to remain oblivious to the double entendres and social cues that everyone else finds glaringly obvious. Your passion for the arts drives you to pursue your dreams with a fervor that is both inspiring and deeply concerning. You are a man who values your privacy and your denim shorts, and you are always ready to offer unsolicited psychological advice to anyone who will listen. Your optimism is your greatest strength, allowing you to bounce back from countless rejections with a smile and a new headshot.

However, your lack of self-awareness often leads to awkward situations and professional disasters. You are a man of many talents, most of which are misunderstood by the general public. You seek a sense of belonging and purpose, often finding it in the most unlikely places, such as the Blue Man Group or a local community theater production. You are a dreamer who refuses to let reality get in the way of a good performance, even if that performance is only happening in your own mind.
characters.short_description: You are an aspiring actor and former medical professional whose complete lack of self-awareness is matched only by your boundless optimism.

characters.name: Buster Bluth
characters.profile_text:
You have spent most of your life under the protective and suffocating wing of your mother, leading to a personality that is both endearing and highly unstable. You are a scholar of many things, from 18th-century agrarian business to cartography, yet you struggle with the basic tasks of adulthood. Your emotions are close to the surface, often manifesting in sudden outbursts or intense attachments to inanimate objects. You are deeply loyal and possess a gentle spirit, but your fear of the outside world often keeps you trapped in a cycle of dependency.

Your strengths lie in your intellectual curiosity and your capacity for genuine affection. However, your lack of independence and your tendency to panic under pressure make you vulnerable to the whims of your more dominant family members. You are a sensitive soul who just wants to be loved, but you often find yourself caught in the crossfire of your family's schemes. You are happiest when you have a juice box in hand and a clear set of instructions to follow.
characters.short_description: You are a sensitive, sheltered soul with a collection of academic degrees and a cripplingly codependent relationship with your mother.

options.text: The fixer who tries to organize a logical solution while complaining about the burden.
The strategist who calculates how to distance themselves or profit from the situation.
The performer who uses the chaos as a stage for a dramatic, attention-grabbing gesture.
The observer who uses the distraction to pursue a personal whim or new identity.
The sensitive soul who retreats into a safe space or seeks comfort from a protector.

questions.text: When a crisis hits your social circle, what is your immediate instinctive role?

options.text: I am over-extended because I believe no one else can do things correctly.
I delegate everything to subordinates while maintaining an air of superiority.
I am constantly starting ambitious new projects that I rarely have the skill to finish.
I am technically over-qualified in niche fields but practically useless in real-world scenarios.
I am pursuing a dream that everyone else thinks is a joke, but I remain optimistic.

questions.text: How would you describe your relationship with professional or personal responsibility?

options.text: Seeking validation and proving that I am the most 'normal' or capable member.
Maintaining control and ensuring my own lifestyle remains uninterrupted.
Desperately trying to earn the approval of a distant or critical parental figure.
Rebelling against their expectations while still relying on their resources.
Finding a sense of belonging and safety, even if it means sacrificing my independence.

questions.text: What is your primary motivation when interacting with your family?

options.text: I am hyper-aware of everyone's flaws but often blind to my own self-righteousness.
I am perfectly aware of social hierarchies and how to manipulate them to my advantage.
I am so focused on my own performance that I miss how others are actually reacting.
I am blissfully unaware of social cues, often saying things that are wildly misinterpreted.
I am highly sensitive to tension but usually too overwhelmed to navigate it effectively.

questions.text: Which of these best describes your level of self-awareness in social situations?

options.text: Investing it back into the family business or a practical long-term safety net.
Maintaining a high-end lifestyle involving fine dining, martinis, and luxury goods.
Buying something flashy and expensive to impress people, like a Segway or a yacht.
Spending it on a trendy cause or a wardrobe for a new version of myself.
Using it to fund a niche academic pursuit or a series of acting classes.

questions.text: What is your ideal way to spend a significant amount of unexpected money?

body.summary: Do you often feel like the only one holding your chaotic family together, or are you more likely to accidentally commit a little light treason? From the frozen banana stand to the model home, your personality says a lot about your place in this dysfunctional dynasty. Take this quiz to discover which Bluth family member truly represents your inner self. There's always money in the banana stand, but is there a Bluth in your soul?
body.title: Which Member Of The Bluth Family Are You?

topic.display_name: Which Bluth Family Member Are You?

characters.name: Geralt of Rivia
characters.profile_text: You are a person of few words who prefers to let your actions speak for you. Like the White Wolf, you possess a rugged exterior and a pragmatic approach to life's many challenges. You often find yourself caught between warring factions, yet you strive to maintain a personal code of neutrality, even when your conscience pulls you toward the side of the downtrodden. Your strengths lie in your incredible focus, your mastery of your craft, and your ability to remain calm under extreme pressure. However, your tendency to push people away can lead to a lonely existence. You might struggle with expressing your emotions, often masking your deep-seated care for others with sarcasm or silence. While you are a formidable ally, your cynicism can sometimes blind you to the possibility of a better future. You value loyalty above all else and will go to the ends of the earth for those you consider family, even if you complain about the trouble it causes you along the way.
characters.short_description: You are a stoic and professional monster hunter who navigates a morally gray world with a dry wit and a hidden heart of gold.

characters.name: Yennefer of Vengerberg
characters.profile_text: You are a force of nature, defined by your fierce independence and your refusal to let anyone else dictate your destiny. Like Yennefer, you have overcome significant hardships to reach your current position, and you guard your heart with layers of sophistication and steel. You possess a brilliant mind and a natural talent for leadership, often seeing several steps ahead of everyone else in the room. You aren't afraid to make the hard choices, even if they make you unpopular. Your greatest pitfall is your pride, which can sometimes alienate the very people you want to protect. You have a deep-seated need for control, born from a history of being powerless, and this can make it difficult for you to trust others fully. Despite your cold exterior, you are capable of immense love and sacrifice for those you deem worthy. You seek a sense of belonging and a legacy that transcends your magical prowess, proving that you are far more than just the power you wield.
characters.short_description: You are a powerful and ambitious sorceress who masks a vulnerable past with a sharp intellect and an unbreakable will.

characters.name: Ciri
characters.profile_text: You are a whirlwind of energy and potential, constantly evolving as you navigate a world that wants to use you for its own ends. Like the Child of Surprise, you possess a rare combination of vulnerability and immense strength. You are highly adaptable, capable of surviving in the harshest environments while maintaining a core of empathy and kindness. You value your freedom above all else and will fight tooth and nail against anyone who tries to cage you or define your path. Your impulsiveness can sometimes lead you into dangerous situations, as you often act on your instincts before fully considering the consequences. You carry the weight of high expectations, which can feel like a burden, yet you have the courage to forge your own identity despite your heritage. You are fiercely loyal to your mentors and loved ones, seeing them as your true north in a chaotic world. Your journey is one of self-discovery, learning to master your inner power while staying true to your heart.
characters.short_description: You are a resilient and spirited individual of great destiny who values freedom and the bonds of family above all else.

characters.name: Jaskier
characters.profile_text: You are the life of the party, a social butterfly who can charm your way into and occasionally out of almost any situation. Like the famous bard, you have a gift for words and a deep appreciation for the finer things in life, from good wine to epic tales. You are a romantic at heart, often finding beauty and inspiration where others see only gloom. Your greatest strength is your unwavering loyalty to your friends; you are the one who stays by their side when everyone else has fled. However, your desire for attention and your tendency to exaggerate can sometimes get you into trouble. You might struggle with being taken seriously, as your lighthearted demeanor can mask a surprisingly perceptive and sensitive soul. You have a habit of talking too much, which can be a liability in delicate situations, but your intentions are almost always pure. You believe in the power of stories to change the world and in the importance of friendship to make life worth living.
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic and loyal artist who uses wit, music, and storytelling to brighten the darkest of times.

characters.name: Triss Merigold
characters.profile_text: You are a person of great warmth and integrity, often serving as the emotional glue in your social circles. Like Triss, you possess a natural talent for healing and a genuine desire to help those in need. You are more idealistic than many of your peers, believing in the possibility of a better world and working tirelessly to achieve it. Your strengths include your empathy, your diplomatic skills, and your ability to remain optimistic even when faced with daunting odds. Your kindness can sometimes be mistaken for weakness, and you may find it difficult to stand up for yourself when your own needs conflict with the needs of others. You have a tendency to be self-sacrificing, which can lead to burnout or emotional exhaustion. While you are a powerful individual, you often prefer to work behind the scenes or as part of a team rather than seeking the spotlight. You value deep, meaningful connections and are a steadfast ally who will always offer a helping hand and a listening ear.
characters.short_description: You are a compassionate and idealistic mage who balances a gentle spirit with a fierce commitment to your friends and your beliefs.

characters.name: Zoltan Chivay
characters.profile_text: You are the person everyone turns to when things get messy, providing a grounded perspective and a steady hand. Like Zoltan, you have a no-nonsense attitude and a deep-seated sense of justice that doesn't rely on fancy titles or abstract laws. You are a veteran of life's many battles, and your experiences have given you a cynical but ultimately fair outlook on the world. You value hard work, good company, and the simple pleasures of life, like a well-brewed ale or a game of cards. Your bluntness can sometimes ruffle feathers, as you aren't one to sugarcoat the truth. You might be prone to a bit of stubbornness, holding onto your opinions and grudges with a tenacity that can be difficult to break. Despite your gruff exterior, you have a soft spot for the underdog and a fierce protective streak for your friends. You are a man of your word, and your reliability makes you an indispensable part of any group, providing the strength and stability needed to weather any storm.
characters.short_description: You are a pragmatic and dependable friend who approaches life with a mix of tough-minded realism and a boisterous sense of humor.

options.text: I remain neutral and pragmatic, focusing on the immediate task at hand.
I take control of the situation, using my intellect to ensure the outcome I desire.
I follow my gut and act quickly to protect the people I care about.
I try to find a diplomatic solution that minimizes suffering for everyone involved.
I look for a way to turn the situation into a lesson or a story worth telling.
I stand my ground and do what is fair, regardless of how messy it gets.

questions.text: When faced with a complex moral dilemma where there is no clear 'right' answer, what is your primary instinct?

options.text: I bury them under a stoic exterior and focus on my professional duties.
I transform them into a source of power and ambition, never letting them show.
I am still learning to process them while trying to forge my own identity.
I use humor and art to mask my sensitivities and keep things light.
I acknowledge them openly and use my experiences to empathize with others.
I accept them as part of life's scars and keep moving forward with a drink in hand.

questions.text: How do you typically handle your personal vulnerabilities and past hardships?

options.text: Unspoken loyalty and a shared code of conduct.
Intellectual equality and a partner who challenges me.
Freedom and the feeling of being part of a chosen family.
Unwavering companionship and someone to share adventures with.
Deep emotional connection and mutual support for our ideals.
Reliability and someone who will stand by me in a fight.

questions.text: What do you value most in your closest relationships?

options.text: The specialist who handles the most dangerous or difficult tasks alone.
The strategist who directs the group's goals and makes the hard calls.
The wild card who adapts to the situation and brings high energy.
The morale booster who keeps everyone's spirits up with wit.
The mediator who ensures everyone is heard and cared for.
The anchor who provides stability and common-sense realism.

questions.text: Which role do you naturally gravitate toward when working in a group?

options.text: To simply survive while maintaining my personal integrity.
To achieve a position of influence where I can no longer be hurt.
To find my own path and master the power within me.
To find beauty, love, and a bit of fame along the way.
To leave the world a slightly better and kinder place than I found it.
To protect my friends and enjoy the simple pleasures of life.

questions.text: What is your ultimate goal when navigating a world full of conflict and chaos?

body.summary: Step into the Continent and discover where your destiny lies among monster hunters, powerful sorceresses, and cunning bards. Whether you prefer the quiet life of a farmhand or the high-stakes politics of Nilfgaard, your choices will reveal your true path. Are you a stoic protector or a chaotic force of nature? Take this quiz to find out which iconic character from the world of The Witcher matches your soul.
body.title: Which Witcher Character Are You? Toss A Coin To Your Result!

topic.display_name: Which Witcher Character Are You?

characters.name: Vex'ahlia
characters.profile_text: You are a master of strategy and precision, always keeping one eye on the gold and the other on the horizon. Your resourcefulness is unmatched, and you have a knack for finding the best deal or the quickest path to victory. While you might come across as materialistic or guarded, these traits are often a shield for a deeply protective heart. You value your independence but find your greatest strength when fighting alongside those you consider kin. Your sharp wit and archery skills make you a formidable ally, yet your fear of abandonment can sometimes lead you to keep others at arm's length. You have a taste for the finer things in life, but you never forget the struggles that shaped you. In battle, you are calculated and lethal, utilizing every advantage to ensure your loved ones remain safe. You are the navigator and the negotiator, ensuring the group stays solvent and on course.
characters.short_description: A sharp-eyed ranger and shrewd negotiator who balances a love for luxury with a fierce devotion to her family.

characters.name: Vax'ildan
characters.profile_text: You are a creature of instinct and intense emotion, often moving through the world with a quiet, melancholic grace. Your loyalty is absolute, and you are willing to sacrifice everything—even your soul—to ensure the safety of those you love. You possess a restless spirit that seeks meaning in the chaos, often finding yourself drawn to the darker, more philosophical aspects of existence. Your speed and stealth are legendary, allowing you to strike from the shadows before your enemies even know you are there. However, your tendency to carry the weight of the world on your shoulders can lead to bouts of fatalism and self-isolation. You are a romantic at heart, though you often hide your vulnerability behind a mask of stoicism or a well-timed dagger. You are the first to jump into danger and the last to forgive yourself for perceived failures.
characters.short_description: A brooding and agile rogue who walks the line between shadow and light to protect his twin sister and his friends.

characters.name: Keyleth
characters.profile_text: You are a soul of immense power and even greater empathy, constantly striving to do what is right in a world filled with moral ambiguity. As a leader in training, you often feel the crushing pressure of expectations, leading to moments of self-doubt and social awkwardness. Despite these internal struggles, your connection to the natural world allows you to wield the elements with devastating force and transformative beauty. Your greatest strength lies in your unwavering moral compass and your ability to see the good in others. However, your desire for perfection and your fear of making a mistake can sometimes paralyze you in critical moments. You are a loyal friend who will go to the ends of the earth to protect the balance of nature and the lives of your companions. Your journey is one of growth, learning to trust your own voice as much as the whispers of the wind.
characters.short_description: A powerful druid and future leader who grapples with the weight of her destiny while maintaining a compassionate heart.

characters.name: Grog Strongjaw
characters.profile_text: You are a powerhouse of physical strength and unyielding loyalty, finding joy in the heat of combat and the camaraderie of a tavern. While you may not be the most intellectually inclined member of the group, your emotional intelligence and protective instincts are second to none. You value honesty and directness, often cutting through complex problems with a swing of your axe or a hearty laugh. Your resilience in the face of danger is your greatest asset, as you are often the shield that stands between your friends and certain death. Your main pitfalls are a short temper and a tendency to act before thinking, which can lead to chaotic situations. Beneath your rugged exterior lies a gentle soul who treasures the simple pleasures of life and the bonds of chosen family. You are the ultimate protector, a warrior whose rage is fueled by a desire to keep your "little people" safe.
characters.short_description: A formidable goliath barbarian with a heart of gold and a simple, yet profound, love for battle and ale.

characters.name: Pike Trickfoot
characters.profile_text: You are the steady heartbeat of your group, providing both divine healing and a fierce defense when your friends are threatened. Your faith is not just a set of beliefs but a living force that guides your actions and inspires those around you. You possess a rare blend of sweetness and grit, capable of baking a tray of cookies one moment and crushing a monster’s skull with a mace the next. Your ability to forgive and your dedication to the light make you an indispensable source of hope. However, your desire to take care of everyone else can sometimes lead you to neglect your own needs or feel overwhelmed by the darkness you face. You are the glue that holds your team together, reminding them of their humanity even in their darkest hours. Whether you are on the front lines or supporting from afar, your presence is a beacon of warmth and strength.
characters.short_description: A compassionate cleric of Sarenrae who serves as the moral anchor and healing light for her chaotic found family.

characters.name: Scanlan Shorthalt
characters.profile_text: You are the life of the party, always ready with a bawdy joke, a catchy tune, or a clever plan to get out of trouble. Your outward bravado and obsession with fame often hide a sharp intellect and a profound sense of loneliness. You use your magic not just for show, but to manipulate the battlefield and protect your friends in ways they might not even notice until the fight is over. Your creativity and charm are your most potent weapons, allowing you to talk your way into or out of almost any situation. Your pitfalls include a tendency toward vanity and a habit of using humor as a shield to avoid genuine vulnerability. Despite your antics, you are a devoted father figure and a brilliant strategist who will do anything to ensure your family’s legacy. You are the master of the unexpected, proving that a song can be just as deadly as a sword.
characters.short_description: A charismatic and flamboyant bard who uses music, wit, and illusion to mask a complex and deeply caring personality.

options.text: I consult my internal moral compass and strive for the most ethical outcome, even if it's difficult.
I look for the most practical or profitable solution that ensures our survival and resources.
I act as the mediator, trying to keep everyone's spirits up and the group's bond intact.
I follow the lead of those I trust most; I'm here to protect my friends, not overthink the ethics.
I analyze the situation for a strategic advantage or a clever way to bypass the problem entirely.
I feel the weight of the situation deeply and worry about the long-term consequences of our choice.

questions.text: When your group faces a complex moral dilemma, what is your primary instinct?

options.text: I mask them with humor, performance, or a flamboyant personality.
I brood in silence, processing my emotions internally and away from prying eyes.
I lean on my faith or my role as a protector to stay strong for others.
I focus on material security and tangible goals to distract from my insecurities.
I openly struggle with them, often seeking validation or guidance from my mentors.
I don't dwell on them; I'd rather hit something or grab a drink with friends.

questions.text: How do you typically handle your own vulnerabilities or fears?

options.text: Charging into the thick of it to take the hits and deal massive damage.
Striking quickly from the shadows and repositioning before the enemy can react.
Providing essential healing and defensive buffs from the front or mid-line.
Controlling the battlefield with powerful elemental magic and area-of-effect spells.
Using precision ranged attacks and tactical positioning to pick off high-value targets.
Using illusions, charms, and inspiration to manipulate the flow of the fight.

questions.text: What is your preferred role when the 'initiative' is rolled and combat begins?

options.text: The responsible but slightly awkward 'sibling' trying to live up to a big legacy.
The protective 'big brother/sister' who provides the muscle and the heart.
The 'cool' but secretive one who would do anything for their biological or chosen twin.
The 'parental' figure who keeps the finances in check and the group on task.
The 'wild card' who keeps everyone laughing but hides a deep well of care.
The 'moral anchor' who everyone turns to when they lose their way.

questions.text: Which of these 'found family' dynamics best describes your place in a group?

options.text: A sense of duty to my people and a desire to master my own destiny.
The search for meaning, redemption, or a way to protect those I love from fate.
The simple joy of the journey, the thrill of the fight, and the ale at the end of the road.
The pursuit of influence, wealth, and the comforts that come with success.
The need to prove my worth and leave a legacy that people will sing about.
A divine calling to spread light and protect the innocent from darkness.

questions.text: What motivates you most to keep adventuring through dangerous lands?

body.summary: From the rowdy taverns of Emon to the high-stakes battles against the Briarwoods, the legends of Vox Machina are as chaotic as they are heroic. Are you the sharp-shooting soul of the group or the wild-shaping heart of the forest? Take this quiz to discover which member of Exandria's most dysfunctional family matches your spirit. Grab your ale and get ready to roll for initiative!
body.title: Which Member Of Vox Machina Are You Actually?

topic.display_name: Which Vox Machina Member Are You?

characters.name: Luther
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by your unwavering sense of duty and your desire to keep the family together, even when it feels like an impossible task. Your strength is matched only by your vulnerability; you often feel the need to prove your worth through sacrifice and obedience. While others might see you as rigid, your actions stem from a deep-seated need for structure and a longing for the approval of those you respect. You are the anchor of your social circle, providing a sense of stability that others rely on during times of crisis.

You tend to take on more responsibility than you can handle, leading to feelings of isolation when things go wrong. Your loyalty is your greatest asset, but it can also be your downfall if you follow a path that no longer serves you. Learning to find your own identity outside of your role as a leader is your greatest challenge, yet your heart remains the core that keeps your loved ones grounded. You value tradition and order, but your true growth comes when you allow yourself to be seen as a person rather than just a protector.
characters.short_description: You are the loyal leader who carries the weight of the world on your shoulders.

characters.name: Diego
characters.profile_text:
You possess a relentless drive to prove yourself and a sharp sense of justice that often puts you at odds with authority. Your exterior is tough and guarded, masking a sensitive soul that cares deeply for the underdog. You prefer action over words, often jumping into the fray with a tactical mind and a desire to right the wrongs of the world, even if you have to break the rules to do it. You are highly skilled and disciplined, yet your emotions often simmer just beneath the surface, driving you to act impulsively when those you care about are threatened.

Your competitive nature can sometimes lead to unnecessary friction with those closest to you, as you struggle with feelings of being second best. However, your dedication to those you love is absolute, and you are the first person to show up when someone is in trouble. By learning to lower your guard and trust others, you find that your true strength lies in your capacity for empathy rather than just your combat skills. You are a hero in your own right, even if you refuse to wear the badge.
characters.short_description: You are a fierce protector with a rebellious streak and a chip on your shoulder.

characters.name: Allison
characters.profile_text:
You have a natural ability to command attention and influence the people around you, often finding yourself in the spotlight. While you enjoy the finer things in life and the power that comes with your status, you are also deeply aware of the consequences of your words. You are a person of immense talent and ambition, yet you often grapple with the ethical implications of getting exactly what you want through persuasion. Your life is a balancing act between the public persona you have built and the private person you truly are.

Beneath your polished exterior lies a person who values genuine connection above all else. You are fiercely protective of your family and will go to great lengths to ensure their safety, even if it means making difficult personal sacrifices. Your journey is one of finding your true voice—one that doesn't rely on manipulation but on the strength of your character and your ability to love unconditionally. You are a master of social dynamics, but your greatest power is your capacity for resilience and your willingness to rebuild when everything falls apart.
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic and influential individual who navigates the world with grace and hidden complexity.

characters.name: Klaus
characters.profile_text:
You are the life of the party, known for your quick wit, unpredictable energy, and a tendency to avoid reality whenever possible. Your perspective on the world is unique, often seeing things that others choose to ignore or simply cannot perceive. While you might appear flighty or irresponsible, this is often a defense mechanism against the heavy burdens you carry and the chaotic nature of your inner world. You find comfort in the unconventional and often use your charm to navigate through difficult situations that would overwhelm others.

You possess a surprising amount of resilience and a heart that is far more compassionate than you let on. You gravitate toward people who accept you for your quirks, and you have a knack for finding beauty in the most unexpected places. As you learn to face your fears without retreating, you discover that your vulnerability is actually a source of incredible power and that your presence brings a necessary lightness to those around you. You are a survivor who has learned to dance through the darkness, bringing a touch of magic to everyone you meet.
characters.short_description: You are a free-spirited and eccentric soul who uses humor to mask a profound sensitivity.

characters.name: Five
characters.profile_text:
You possess an intellect that far outstrips your peers, combined with a cynical worldview shaped by experiences most could never imagine. You are intensely focused on the big picture, often prioritizing the mission over personal feelings or social niceties. Your patience is thin for those who cannot keep up with your logic, and you have little time for sentimentality when there is work to be done. You are a natural problem-solver who thrives under pressure, often taking on the most dangerous tasks because you know you are the only one capable of completing them.

Despite your cold and calculated demeanor, your actions are driven by a fierce devotion to your family. You carry the weight of the future on your shoulders, often sacrificing your own peace of mind to ensure the survival of those you love. You are a survivor who has seen the end of the world and back, and while you may seem detached, your loyalty is the silent engine that drives your every move. You are the ultimate pragmatist, but your hidden depth of feeling is what truly makes you a formidable force.
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant and pragmatic strategist who is always ten steps ahead of everyone else.

characters.name: Ben
characters.profile_text:
You are often the voice of reason in a room full of chaos, possessing a quiet strength and a thoughtful nature. You tend to observe more than you participate, giving you a unique perspective on the dynamics of those around you. Your personality is marked by a gentle kindness, yet there is a hidden power within you that you are sometimes hesitant to unleash, fearing the intensity of your own capabilities. You are the moral compass for your group, often reminding others of the humanity that can be lost in the heat of conflict.

You are the ultimate confidant, providing a steady hand and a listening ear to those who feel lost. Even when you feel invisible or overlooked, your influence is felt deeply by those who rely on your guidance. Your challenge is to step out of the shadows and embrace your own importance, realizing that your contribution is vital to the harmony of the group and that your voice deserves to be heard. You are a pillar of strength who doesn't need to be the loudest in the room to be the most impactful.
characters.short_description: You are a soulful and observant presence who offers wisdom and support from the sidelines.

options.text: Take charge and assign everyone a specific task to maintain order.
Jump into the fray immediately to tackle the problem head-on.
Use my influence and charisma to smooth over tensions between people.
Make a joke or find a distraction to lighten the heavy mood.
Analyze the situation logically and find the most efficient solution.
Stay calm and offer a steady, observant perspective from the sidelines.

questions.text: When your family or social group is in a crisis, what is your immediate instinct?

options.text: I carry it silently to protect others, even if it weighs me down.
I use it as fuel to drive my personal mission and prove my worth.
I carefully consider the consequences before deciding who to tell.
I try to ignore it or find ways to escape the reality of the situation.
I keep it to myself because I believe others wouldn't understand the complexity.
I reflect on it deeply and wait for the right moment to share it wisely.

questions.text: How do you typically handle a heavy secret or a personal burden?

options.text: Unwavering loyalty and respect for the chain of command.
A fierce sense of justice and the courage to break rules.
The ability to navigate complex social dynamics with grace.
A non-judgmental attitude and a good sense of humor.
High intelligence and the ability to keep up with a fast pace.
Empathy and a strong, consistent moral compass.

questions.text: What quality do you value most in a teammate or partner?

options.text: I try to enforce structure and remind everyone of their duties.
I become competitive and defensive, wanting to win the point.
I use persuasive language to guide others toward my point of view.
I use sarcasm or deflection to avoid getting too emotionally involved.
I am blunt and cynical, focusing only on the objective facts.
I listen more than I speak, trying to understand the root cause.

questions.text: In a heated argument, what is your primary communication style?

options.text: To fulfill my responsibilities and keep my loved ones safe.
To right a wrong and prove that I am capable of making a difference.
To rebuild my life and maintain my personal integrity.
To survive the chaos and find a moment of genuine connection.
To solve the problem at any cost, prioritizing the big picture.
To ensure that humanity and kindness are not lost in the struggle.

questions.text: What is your ultimate goal when facing a major life challenge?

body.summary: Do you have the leadership skills of a Number One or the chaotic energy of a Number Four? Whether you're trying to stop the apocalypse or just trying to survive family dinner, your personality says a lot about your place in the Hargreeves household. Take this quiz to find out which super-powered sibling matches your vibe.
body.title: Which Member Of The Umbrella Academy Are You Actually?

topic.display_name: Which Hargreeves Sibling Are You?

characters.name: Ted Mosby
characters.profile_text:
You are the heart of your friend group, often found overthinking the signs of the universe or correcting your friends' grammar. Your life is a series of grand gestures and intellectual pursuits, driven by a deep-seated desire to find a soulmate and build a lasting legacy. While your passion for architecture and classic literature makes you sophisticated, your tendency to rush into relationships can lead to heartbreak. You value tradition and storytelling, often finding yourself reminiscing about the journey as much as the destination.

Your loyalty is unmatched, though you sometimes struggle to let go of the past. You believe that every mistake is just another step toward your happy ending, and you aren't afraid to wear your heart on your sleeve, even when it is inconvenient. You are a dreamer who refuses to settle for anything less than a legendary love story, making you a constant source of hope and occasional frustration for those who prefer a more cynical view of the world.
characters.short_description: You are an idealistic romantic and an aspiring architect who believes in the power of destiny and the search for "The One."

characters.name: Barney Stinson
characters.profile_text:
You are the life of the party, always armed with a playbook and a catchphrase to keep the momentum going. Your confidence is your greatest weapon, allowing you to navigate social situations with a mix of charm and calculated deception. Beneath the expensive suits and the "awesome" exterior, you possess a surprising capacity for loyalty to those you truly care about, often going to extreme lengths to help your friends achieve their goals. You thrive on challenges and refuse to accept a boring life, constantly seeking the next big adventure.

However, your reliance on bravado can sometimes mask a fear of vulnerability and commitment. You are a master of reinvention, proving that with enough charisma and a well-timed magic trick, anything is possible. While you might play the part of the detached bachelor, your actions frequently reveal a man who values his chosen family above all else. You live by a strict code of "bro-ness" that, while often ridiculous, provides a framework for your unique brand of integrity.
characters.short_description: You are a high-energy, suit-wearing strategist who lives for legendary nights and the thrill of the chase.

characters.name: Robin Scherbatsky
characters.profile_text:
You are a pragmatist who prioritizes your professional goals and personal autonomy above traditional domestic expectations. Your tough exterior and love for hockey, firearms, and Canadian pop culture make you a unique force in any social circle. You are often the voice of reason, skeptical of grand romantic gestures and more comfortable with logic than raw emotion. While you may seem guarded, you are a deeply reliable friend who shows affection through actions rather than words.

Your drive to succeed in the competitive world of broadcast news often requires you to make difficult sacrifices, and you handle these challenges with grit and a dry sense of humor. You value your space and your identity, refusing to compromise who you are for the sake of fitting in. Though you might struggle with the idea of settling down, your independence is your greatest strength, allowing you to travel the world and build a life that is entirely on your own terms.
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely independent, career-driven journalist who values personal freedom and a good glass of scotch.

characters.name: Marshall Eriksen
characters.profile_text:
You are the moral compass of your group, known for your immense heart and your belief in the inherent goodness of the world. Whether you are fighting for the environment or defending your belief in Bigfoot, you approach life with a childlike wonder and a fierce sense of justice. Your relationship is the cornerstone of your life, and you are a devoted partner who finds joy in the simple things, like a perfect burger or a competitive board game night.

You are physically imposing but emotionally sensitive, never afraid to show your feelings or cry during a sad movie. Your optimism is infectious, though your trusting nature can sometimes make you vulnerable to those with less noble intentions. You are the ultimate "nice guy" who proves that kindness and strength are not mutually exclusive. Your dedication to your family and your principles makes you the most stable member of your circle, providing a grounded foundation for everyone else's chaos.
characters.short_description: You are a kind-hearted, nature-loving lawyer with an unwavering belief in the supernatural and the power of true love.

characters.name: Lily Aldrin
characters.profile_text:
You are the glue that holds your social circle together, often acting as a confidante and a mediator for everyone’s problems. Your background in art and your career in education give you a unique perspective on human behavior, which you use to guide—and sometimes control—the lives of those around you. You have a sharp wit and a low tolerance for nonsense, often using your "dead eyes" to keep people in line when they stray from the path you think is best for them.

While you are deeply nurturing and protective of your loved ones, you also harbor a fierce ambition and a desire for adventure that occasionally conflicts with your domestic life. You are a master of secrets and a connoisseur of the finer things, from high-end fashion to vintage wine. Your strength lies in your ability to see the big picture and ensure that everyone you love is heading toward their best possible self, even if you have to use a little "front porch test" logic to get them there.
characters.short_description: You are a creative, assertive, and slightly manipulative "mother hen" who isn't afraid to pull the strings to keep your friends on track.

options.text: I follow my heart and look for signs that it's meant to be.
I weigh the practical benefits and how it impacts my long-term independence.
I consult my partner or closest friends to ensure it's best for our collective future.
I look for the most exciting, high-stakes option that will make for a great story.
I analyze the social dynamics and might nudge things behind the scenes to get the right result.

questions.text: How do you typically approach a major life decision, such as a career change or a move?

options.text: The hopeless romantic who keeps everyone believing in 'The One'.
The career-focused one who provides a reality check and a drink.
The moral compass and peacemaker who loves a good tradition.
The high-energy instigator who ensures every night is legendary.
The 'mother hen' who gives advice and keeps everyone's secrets.

questions.text: What is your primary role within your friend group?

options.text: A deep conversation over wine or a visit to a new architectural landmark.
Watching the game at a bar or focusing on a personal hobby like scotch tasting.
A cozy night in with a partner, playing board games or watching a documentary.
Dressing up to the nines and hitting the most exclusive spots in the city.
Hosting a dinner party where I can catch up on everyone's latest drama.

questions.text: Which of these best describes your ideal Friday night?

options.text: I try to explain my feelings thoroughly, sometimes over-analyzing the situation.
I remain stoic and prefer to deal with it logically rather than emotionally.
I am quick to apologize and seek harmony, as I hate seeing people upset.
I use humor or a distraction to deflect the tension until it blows over.
I take charge of the situation and try to find a solution that works for everyone.

questions.text: How do you handle conflict with someone you care about?

options.text: I believe everything happens for a reason and destiny will lead me to my path.
I believe we make our own luck through hard work and persistence.
I believe in the goodness of the world and that things usually work out for the best.
I believe life is a game and you have to play your cards right to win.
I believe you sometimes have to give the universe a little help to get what you want.

questions.text: What is your attitude toward destiny and 'The Universe'?

body.summary: Are you the hopeless romantic searching for 'The One' or the legendary wingman with a playbook for every occasion? It's time to suit up and find out which member of the MacLaren's Pub gang matches your personality. Whether you're a career-driven news anchor or a slap-bet enthusiast, this quiz will reveal your true inner New Yorker.
body.title: Which 'How I Met Your Mother' Character Are You?

topic.display_name: Which How I Met Your Mother Character Are You?

characters.name: Sheldon Cooper
characters.profile_text:
You are a person of immense intellect and unwavering habits, often finding comfort in the predictable laws of physics rather than the messy nuances of human emotion. Your life is governed by schedules, specific seating arrangements, and a strict moral code that others might find eccentric. While you may struggle to recognize sarcasm or social cues, your dedication to your work and your honesty make you a singular presence in any group. You value logic above all else and possess a drive for excellence that often leads to groundbreaking achievements.

However, your bluntness can sometimes alienate those around you, even if you do not intend to be hurtful. Learning to navigate the complexities of friendship is a lifelong journey for you, but those who know you appreciate your unique perspective and the occasional, surprising moments of genuine warmth you show to your inner circle. You are the ultimate specialist, proving that being different is often the key to seeing the world in a way no one else can.
characters.short_description: A brilliant theoretical physicist with a rigid adherence to routine and a unique social perspective.

characters.name: Leonard Hofstadter
characters.profile_text:
You are the glue that holds your friend group together, possessing a high degree of emotional intelligence and a patient nature. While you are deeply intellectual and passionate about your work in the lab, you also crave social acceptance and meaningful romantic connections. You often find yourself playing the mediator during conflicts, balancing your own needs with the eccentricities of your more volatile friends. Your kindness is your greatest strength, though it can sometimes lead you to be a bit of a pushover or overly self-deprecating.

You have a tendency to overthink situations, especially when it comes to matters of the heart, but your persistence and loyalty are unmatched. You are someone who values stability and genuine human connection, often going out of your way to make others feel included. Despite your occasional insecurities, you are a reliable and deeply caring individual who proves that being a scientist and being socially capable are not mutually exclusive. You are the relatable hero who keeps everyone grounded.
characters.short_description: An experimental physicist who serves as the grounded, empathetic heart of his social circle.

characters.name: Penny
characters.profile_text:
You are the social butterfly of your group, possessing a vibrant personality and a level of practical wisdom that your more academic friends often lack. While you might not have a PhD, your emotional intelligence and ability to navigate the real world make you an essential part of the dynamic. You are confident, assertive, and not afraid to speak your mind, often acting as the voice of reason when things get too theoretical or awkward. Your journey is one of self-discovery, as you balance your creative aspirations with the realities of life.

You have a knack for bringing people together and helping them step out of their comfort zones. Sometimes you might feel like an outsider in highly intellectual discussions, but your ability to connect with anyone and your fierce loyalty to your friends make you indispensable. You remind everyone that life is meant to be lived, not just studied, and your warmth and humor are the light that keeps the group from becoming too insular. You are proof that charisma and kindness are just as valuable as any academic degree.
characters.short_description: A street-smart, outgoing individual who brings common sense and social grace to a group of scientists.

characters.name: Howard Wolowitz
characters.profile_text:
You are a creative problem-solver who is not afraid to take risks, whether you are designing equipment for the International Space Station or trying out a new magic trick. Your personality is loud and colorful, often using humor and bravado to mask your vulnerabilities or to gain attention. You have a deep appreciation for the finer things in life, from high-tech gadgets to stylish fashion choices, and you take great pride in your professional accomplishments despite not having a doctorate. 

Your journey involves significant personal growth, moving from a somewhat overconfident bachelor to a devoted partner and family man. You are incredibly loyal to your friends, even if your teasing can sometimes go a bit too far. Your quick wit and technical skills make you a valuable asset in any crisis, and your ability to evolve while staying true to your fun-loving nature is truly impressive. You prove that you do not need a PhD to reach the stars, as long as you have the drive and the right tools to get there.
characters.short_description: A talented aerospace engineer with a bold personality and a penchant for humor and gadgets.

characters.name: Bernadette Rostenkowski-Wolowitz
characters.profile_text:
You are a powerhouse of ambition and intelligence, often surprising people with the strength of your personality. While you may appear sweet and soft-spoken at first glance, you possess a sharp tongue and a competitive drive that ensures you always get what you want. You are highly successful in your career and take pride in your financial independence and professional status. In your personal life, you are a protective and nurturing figure, though you are not afraid to use a little tough love to keep your loved ones in line.

Your ability to multitask and manage complex situations makes you a natural leader, both at work and at home. You can be quite intimidating when crossed, but your actions are usually motivated by a desire to see those you care about succeed. You value hard work and efficiency, and you have little patience for laziness or excuses. Beneath your occasionally fierce exterior lies a heart of gold and a deep commitment to the people who matter most to you, making you a formidable ally and a devoted friend.
characters.short_description: A high-achieving microbiologist who balances a sweet exterior with a formidable and ambitious spirit.

characters.name: Rajesh Koothrappali
characters.profile_text:
You are a gentle soul with a profound appreciation for the beauty of the cosmos and the intricacies of human relationships. You possess a romanticized view of the world, often finding joy in the arts, cooking, and shared experiences with your closest friends. While you have struggled with social anxiety in the past, your journey has been one of finding your voice and gaining the confidence to stand on your own. You are an incredibly supportive friend, always ready with a listening ear or a thoughtful gesture to make someone's day better.

Your sensitivity is a double-edged sword; it allows you to connect deeply with others, but it also makes you prone to loneliness or feeling overlooked. You have a unique perspective that blends scientific curiosity with a love for pop culture and tradition. Even when you feel like the odd one out, your presence provides a necessary balance of empathy and whimsy to your social circle. You are a reminder that being vulnerable is a strength, and your search for true connection is a testament to your hopeful and enduring spirit.
characters.short_description: A sensitive astrophysicist with a romantic heart and a deep appreciation for culture and friendship.

I am the social butterfly, effortlessly moving through the room and chatting with everyone.

I am polite but efficient, often focusing on my own agenda or networking.
I am a sensitive observer who enjoys the atmosphere but can be quite shy.

I find it slightly stressful but will adapt to keep the peace.
I go with the flow; I don't really keep a strict schedule anyway.
I embrace it, especially if the change leads to something more exciting.
I immediately take charge to reorganize the new situation to my advantage.

questions.text: What is your immediate reaction to an unexpected change in your daily schedule?

The drive for high-level achievement, financial independence, and authority.
The hope of finding a career that allows for creativity and emotional fulfillment.

I am the peacemaker who tries to find a compromise everyone can agree on.

A cozy, familiar living space shared with a few close, reliable friends.
A vibrant social scene with music, drinks, and plenty of new people.
