A romantic or aesthetic setting, like a quiet stargazing spot or a fancy dinner.

questions.text: Which of these environments sounds like your ideal 'happy place'?

body.summary: Are you the genius physicist with a strict spot on the couch or the aspiring actress with a heart of gold? From comic book debates to Cheesecake Factory shifts, your daily habits reveal which member of the Pasadena gang you truly are. Grab your favorite takeout and prepare to find out if you are more of a Bazinga-loving scientist or a lovable engineer!
body.title: Which 'Big Bang Theory' Character Is Actually Your Soul Twin?

topic.display_name: Which Big Bang Theory Character Are You?

characters.name: Phil Dunphy
characters.profile_text: You are a dreamer who finds wonder in the everyday, often approaching life with a childlike enthusiasm that is both infectious and occasionally clumsy. Your philosophy is rooted in Phil's-osophy, a mix of genuine wisdom and quirky puns that reflect your desire to be everyone’s best friend. While you might get distracted by the latest gadget or a complex magic trick, your loyalty to your family is unwavering, and you will go to any lengths to make them smile. You sometimes struggle with boundaries and can be overly sensitive to criticism, especially from those you admire. Your desire to be liked can lead you to avoid difficult confrontations, but your resilience and ability to see the bright side usually carry you through. You value creativity and spontaneity, making you the life of the party and the emotional glue of your social circle.
characters.short_description: You are the ultimate cool dad who leads with optimism, magic tricks, and a heart of gold.

characters.name: Claire Dunphy
characters.profile_text: You are the backbone of your household, possessing a sharp mind and a competitive spirit that drives you to excel in every task you undertake. Whether you are managing a chaotic family schedule or leading a business, you approach challenges with a meticulous eye for detail and a need for control. You find satisfaction in order and efficiency, often stepping up to handle the heavy lifting that others might shy away from. Your intensity can sometimes come across as overbearing, and you may find it difficult to relax or let go of minor mistakes. You have a tendency to take on too much responsibility, leading to stress, yet your deep-seated love for your family ensures that your efforts are always motivated by a desire for their success. You are fiercely protective and incredibly capable, proving that behind every great team is someone like you making sure the wheels don't fall off.
characters.short_description: You are a high-achieving perfectionist who keeps everything running smoothly through sheer force of will and organization.

characters.name: Jay Pritchett
characters.profile_text: You represent the classic tough exterior, soft interior archetype, preferring to show your affection through actions rather than grand emotional displays. You have spent years building your legacy and take great pride in your accomplishments, often serving as the voice of reason and experience for those around you. While you might seem set in your ways, you possess a surprising capacity for growth and a willingness to adapt for the sake of the people you love. Your bluntness can sometimes hurt feelings, and you may struggle to express vulnerability or keep up with the changing social landscape. However, your dry wit and steady presence provide a sense of security to your family. You value loyalty and respect above all else, and though you might grumble about the chaos of modern life, you are ultimately the rock that everyone leans on when things get tough.
characters.short_description: You are a stoic, old-school patriarch who values hard work, tradition, and the quiet satisfaction of a job well done.

characters.name: Gloria Pritchett
characters.profile_text: You command attention whenever you enter a room, thanks to your confidence, charisma, and unapologetic personality. You are deeply connected to your heritage and your family, viewing life through a lens of passion and intensity that makes every moment feel significant. You aren't afraid to speak your mind or stand up for what you believe in, often using your sharp intuition to navigate social situations and protect those you care about. Your temper can be as fiery as your spirit, and your competitive nature sometimes leads to unnecessary drama. You can be stubborn when challenged, but your heart is always in the right place. You bring a sense of excitement and warmth to your environment, reminding everyone that life should be lived loudly and with a great deal of love. Your strength is matched only by your generosity and your unwavering devotion to your kin.
characters.short_description: You are a vibrant, passionate force of nature who fiercely protects your loved ones and stays true to your roots.

characters.name: Mitchell Pritchett
characters.profile_text: You are often the straight man in your social circle, relying on logic and careful planning to manage the unpredictability of life. You have a refined taste and a keen intellect, which you use to excel in your career and maintain a sense of order in your personal affairs. While you may be prone to anxiety and overthinking, your self-awareness and wit allow you to find the humor in even the most awkward situations. You can be somewhat neurotic and defensive, especially when you feel judged or out of your element. You often struggle to step out of your comfort zone, but your commitment to your partner and family pushes you to grow in ways you never expected. You value honesty and integrity, and though you might not be the loudest person in the room, your quiet strength and reliability make you an essential part of the family dynamic.
characters.short_description: You are a cautious, intelligent professional who navigates life with a dry sense of humor and a need for stability.

characters.name: Cameron Tucker
characters.profile_text: You live life as if it were a grand performance, embracing your emotions and your diverse interests with total commitment. Whether you are coaching a team, performing music, or planning an elaborate event, you do so with a level of enthusiasm that is impossible to ignore. You are incredibly nurturing and sensitive, often acting as the emotional barometer for those around you and providing comfort with your warm, outgoing nature. Your flair for the dramatic can sometimes lead to overreactions or a tendency to make situations about yourself. You may struggle with feeling overlooked and can be quite manipulative when trying to get your way, albeit usually with good intentions. Despite these quirks, your capacity for joy and your dedication to your loved ones are boundless. You remind everyone that life is meant to be celebrated with style, passion, and a little bit of sparkle.
characters.short_description: You are a theatrical, larger-than-life personality who brings drama, flair, and immense heart to everything you do.

options.text: I take command and start delegating tasks to restore order immediately.
I try to crack a joke or perform a magic trick to lighten the mood.
I retreat into a corner to overthink the situation and worry about the fallout.
I lean into the drama and express my feelings loudly to ensure I'm heard.
I stay calm, grumble a bit, and wait for everyone else to tire themselves out.
I get fiery and protective, ready to defend my family against any stress.

questions.text: When a family event starts to get chaotic, what is your first move?

options.text: The theatrical life of the party who brings flair to every conversation.
The 'cool' friend who is always trying to stay hip and keep things fun.
The confident and charismatic force that naturally commands the room.
The witty observer who prefers small groups and intellectual banter.
The stoic rock who doesn't say much but is always there when it counts.
The organized host who makes sure everything is running exactly on schedule.

questions.text: How would your friends describe your typical social presence?

Creativity and dreaming big are more important than following boring rules.
Hard work, tradition, and a no-nonsense attitude are the keys to success.
Passion and intuition should guide every decision you make.
Precision, logic, and careful planning are the only ways to avoid disaster.
Everything should be done with a sense of occasion and artistic flair.

questions.text: What is your general philosophy toward work and productivity?

options.text: I live for it—I was born to be in the spotlight!
I enjoy it, especially if it means I'm making people laugh or smile.
I handle it with total grace and unapologetic confidence.
I find it slightly awkward and would usually rather be the one watching.
I don't need the fuss; I'd rather my accomplishments speak for themselves.
I like the recognition, but I'm usually too busy managing things to notice.

questions.text: How do you typically handle being the center of attention?

options.text: Fierce loyalty and protecting them from anyone who dares cross them.
Grand, theatrical gestures and constant emotional validation.
Providing stability and being the steady provider they can lean on.
Acts of service and making sure their life is organized and efficient.
Shared dry humor and being a reliable, logical sounding board.
Unwavering optimism and always trying to make them see the bright side.

questions.text: What is your primary way of showing someone you care about them?

body.summary: Are you the 'cool dad' who knows all the latest slang, or the organized perfectionist who keeps the household running? Whether you're a hopeless romantic or a sarcastic realist, there's a member of the Pritchett-Dunphy clan that matches your vibe perfectly. Take this quiz to find out which iconic character from the mockumentary hit truly represents your personality!
body.title: Which 'Modern Family' Character Are You Actually?

topic.display_name: Which Modern Family Character Are You?

characters.name: Rick Sanchez
characters.profile_text: You possess an intellect that dwarfs everyone around you, allowing you to manipulate reality and traverse the multiverse with ease. While your brilliance is unmatched, it often comes at the cost of emotional connection, leading you to mask your vulnerabilities with sarcasm and substance use. You view the universe as a chaotic, meaningless void, which gives you the ultimate license to do whatever you want, whenever you want. Your primary strength lies in your unparalleled problem-solving skills and your ability to improvise out of any life-threatening situation. However, your god complex and deep-seated loneliness often push away the people who care about you most. You struggle to admit when you are wrong or when you need help, preferring to maintain a facade of total independence. Deep down, you harbor a fierce, albeit dysfunctional, loyalty to your family, even if you would never admit it out loud.
characters.short_description: You are a cynical, nihilistic super-genius who values scientific discovery and personal freedom above all social conventions.

characters.name: Morty Smith
characters.profile_text: You are frequently the voice of reason in a world that has gone completely mad, often finding yourself caught between your desire for a normal life and the high-stakes demands of your grandfather. While you may seem timid or unsure of yourself at first, you possess a surprising amount of resilience and a growing sense of assertiveness. You have a strong moral center and genuinely care about the well-being of others, even when you are forced to make impossible choices in the heat of the moment. Your journey is one of self-discovery, as you learn to navigate your own trauma and stand up for yourself against those who would exploit your kindness. Your greatest pitfall is your tendency to let your insecurities and frustrations boil over into outbursts, sometimes leading to impulsive decisions. Despite the constant danger, you remain the emotional anchor for your family, providing a necessary counterpoint to the cynicism that surrounds you.
characters.short_description: You are a compassionate and often anxious individual who tries to maintain a moral compass while being dragged into chaotic adventures.

characters.name: Summer Smith
characters.profile_text: You are much more capable and observant than people often give you credit for, possessing a sharp wit and a keen understanding of social dynamics. Unlike others who might be overwhelmed by the absurdity of the multiverse, you adapt quickly and often find ways to use the chaos to your advantage. You value your independence and aren't afraid to call out hypocrisy when you see it, making you a formidable presence in any room. Your strengths include your decisiveness and your ability to remain cool under pressure, whether you are dealing with high school drama or alien invasions. However, your desire for validation and your occasional vanity can lead you to prioritize your own image over deeper connections. You sometimes feel overlooked by those you admire, which fuels a drive to prove your worth through action rather than words. Ultimately, you are a survivor who knows how to look out for yourself while still maintaining a hidden layer of protectiveness for your family.
characters.short_description: You are a pragmatic, tech-savvy, and fiercely independent teenager who navigates social hierarchies and interdimensional chaos with equal confidence.

characters.name: Beth Smith
characters.profile_text: You possess a sharp mind and a deep-seated need for approval, particularly from father figures, which often drives your high-achieving nature. As a skilled professional, you take great pride in your work and your ability to handle high-pressure situations, yet you frequently feel unfulfilled by the domestic life you have built. You are fiercely protective of your family, but your internal conflicts and fear of mediocrity can make you appear cold or distant to those closest to you. Your primary strength is your competence and your refusal to back down from a challenge, no matter how daunting it may seem. On the flip side, your tendency to overanalyze your life choices and your fear of being "ordinary" can lead to significant emotional distress and strained relationships. You are constantly searching for a sense of purpose that transcends your daily routine, often wondering if there is a more exciting version of yourself waiting to be unleashed.
characters.short_description: You are a highly intelligent, ambitious, and complex individual who struggles to balance your professional aspirations with your family responsibilities.

characters.name: Jerry Smith
characters.profile_text: You value stability, tradition, and the simple pleasures of life, often finding yourself bewildered by the high-concept chaos that surrounds your family. While you may lack the scientific genius or combat prowess of those around you, you possess a certain kind of stubborn persistence and a desire to be liked by everyone. You often seek validation through external markers of success, which makes you vulnerable to manipulation and self-doubt. Your greatest strength is your occasional ability to find contentment in the mundane, providing a grounded perspective that the rest of your family often lacks. However, your tendency to play the victim and your lack of self-awareness can lead to embarrassing situations and interpersonal friction. You often feel like an outsider in your own home, struggling to find your footing in a world that seems to value everything you are not. Despite your flaws, your sincerity and your occasional moments of genuine bravery show that there is more to you than meets the eye.
characters.short_description: You are a well-meaning but insecure individual who often finds yourself at the mercy of circumstances beyond your control.

options.text: I improvise a radical, unconventional solution, trusting my own superior logic over established rules.
I panic initially but eventually try to do the right thing, even if I feel out of my depth.
I analyze the situation pragmatically and look for the most efficient way to maintain my independence.
I take charge and apply my professional expertise, though I secretly worry if I'm making the right choice.
I look for someone else to tell me what to do or hope the problem eventually goes away on its own.

questions.text: When faced with a complex problem that seems impossible to solve, what is your primary instinct?

options.text: The detached genius who is burdened by the incompetence of everyone else.
The moral compass who often gets dragged into situations against my better judgment.
The observant realist who stays cool under pressure and knows how to navigate social hierarchies.
The high-achiever who provides for everyone but feels a deep, underlying sense of unfulfillment.
The simple soul who just wants stability and a little bit of respect from others.

questions.text: How do you typically view your role within your family or social circle?

options.text: It's a chaotic void, which is great because it means I can do whatever I want without consequence.
It's terrifying and overwhelming, but I still try to find small ways to be a good person.
It's just another environment to adapt to and master using the right tools and attitude.
It makes me feel small and ordinary, fueling my drive to prove I'm actually special.
I prefer not to think about it; I'd rather focus on my hobbies and a nice, quiet life.

questions.text: What is your honest perspective on the vastness and potential meaninglessness of the universe?

options.text: A tendency to push people away to avoid showing any emotional vulnerability.
Anxiety and a lack of assertiveness that lets others walk all over me.
A bit of vanity and a constant need to prove that I'm more capable than people think.
A fear of being mediocre that makes me appear cold or distant to those I love.
A desperate need for external validation and a habit of playing the victim.

questions.text: Which of these traits do you struggle with the most in your personal relationships?

options.text: To escape the boredom of this reality and pursue whatever scientific whim I have today.
I'd probably be forced to use it to fix a mess someone else started, while worrying about the ethics.
To find cool new experiences and gain an edge over my peers back home.
To seek out a version of life where I finally feel satisfied and truly understood.
I'd probably just use it to find a world where people actually appreciate my coin collection.

questions.text: If you had access to a device that could take you anywhere in the multiverse, how would you use it?

body.summary: Wubba Lubba Dub Dub! It’s time to find out if you’re the smartest man in the universe or just a Jerry trying to survive a family dinner. Whether you’re prone to existential crises or interdimensional adventures, this quiz will pinpoint your place in the multiverse. Grab your portal gun and prepare for some harsh truths!
body.title: Which 'Rick and Morty' Character Are You Actually?

topic.display_name: Which Rick and Morty Character Are You?

characters.name: Joel Miller
characters.profile_text:
You are a person of few words who has endured unimaginable loss, leading you to build high walls around your heart. Your survival instincts are unparalleled, honed by years of navigating a world that offers no mercy. While you may appear cynical or even ruthless to outsiders, your actions are governed by a deep-seated need to protect the people you love, often at any cost. You value loyalty and practical skills over idealism, preferring the tangible safety of those close to you over the abstract concept of the greater good. Your strength lies in your resilience and your ability to make the hard choices that others shrink from.

However, your tendency to carry the weight of the world on your shoulders can lead to isolation. You struggle with vulnerability, fearing that opening up will only lead to more pain. Despite your rugged exterior, you possess a hidden depth of tenderness that only a select few ever get to see, making your devotion both a powerful shield and a heavy burden. You are the ultimate guardian, defined by a past you cannot escape and a future you will fight to secure for those you hold dear.
characters.short_description: A hardened survivor driven by a fierce, protective love for those he considers family.

characters.name: Ellie Williams
characters.profile_text:
You are characterized by a fierce independence and a sharp sense of humor that serves as a defense mechanism against a harsh reality. Growing up in a world of constant danger has made you resourceful and brave, yet you carry a profound sense of responsibility and a longing for purpose. You are not afraid to speak your mind or fight for what you believe in, even when the odds are stacked against you. Your loyalty is absolute, and you will go to the ends of the earth for the people who have earned your trust.

However, your intense passion can sometimes manifest as impulsivity or a singular focus on vengeance. You often feel the pressure of expectations, struggling to balance your own desires with the roles others have cast for you. Beneath your tough exterior lies a soul that appreciates the small beauties of the world, from old music to comic books. You are a survivor who refuses to let the darkness extinguish your inner light, even as you navigate the complex moral landscape of your life, searching for a meaning that is entirely your own.
characters.short_description: A resilient and spirited individual whose wit and determination are matched only by the weight of her unique burden.

characters.name: Abby Anderson
characters.profile_text:
You possess an iron will and a physical presence that commands respect, shaped by a life of rigorous training and a singular, driving goal. You are a natural leader who values competence and results, often pushing yourself to the absolute limit to achieve your objectives. Your sense of duty to your group is strong, but it is often overshadowed by a personal quest for closure that has defined your adult life. You are capable of great focus and brutality when necessary, yet you are haunted by the consequences of your actions and the cycle of violence you find yourself trapped in.

Your journey is one of internal conflict, as you learn to reconcile your past with the person you wish to become. You find strength in unexpected connections, discovering that true courage lies not just in combat, but in the ability to show mercy and protect those who cannot protect themselves. While you may seem intimidating, you have a capacity for deep empathy and a desire to find a path toward healing, even when the road is paved with regret. You are a testament to the fact that it is never too late to change your trajectory.
characters.short_description: A disciplined and physically formidable warrior whose life is defined by a complex journey of justice, guilt, and redemption.

characters.name: Tommy Miller
characters.profile_text:
You are a person who values stability and the bonds of community, often acting as a bridge between the harsh realities of survival and the hope for a better future. Unlike those who have grown cold, you retain a sense of idealism and a desire to build something lasting, such as a safe haven for others. You are a skilled tactician and a crack shot, but you prefer to use your talents to defend your home rather than seek out conflict. Your calm demeanor and reliability make you a pillar of strength for those around you, providing a sense of normalcy in chaotic times.

However, your deep sense of justice and loyalty to your family can drive you to take extreme risks when they are threatened. You struggle with the ghosts of your past, occasionally finding it difficult to reconcile the person you were during the darkest days with the leader you have become. You are a man of integrity who believes in the power of second chances, yet you are fully aware that some wounds never truly heal. You represent the enduring human spirit that seeks to preserve civilization even when the world suggests it is already lost.
characters.short_description: A compassionate and skilled marksman who strives to maintain a sense of community and morality in a fractured world.

characters.name: Dina
characters.profile_text:
You are the heart of your social circle, possessing an innate ability to read people and offer support exactly when it is needed most. Your personality is a blend of playful wit and profound emotional intelligence, allowing you to navigate complex relationships with grace and sincerity. You value connection above all else, finding your greatest strength in the love and partnership you share with others. While you are more than capable of holding your own in a fight, your primary focus is on the well-being of your loved ones and the preservation of a life worth living.

You are a realist who understands the dangers of the world, yet you refuse to let fear dictate your actions or dampen your spirit. Your pitfalls often involve putting the needs of others before your own, sometimes to the point of self-sacrifice. You are the person people turn to for comfort and perspective, as you have a unique way of finding beauty and humor even in the most dire circumstances. Your loyalty is not just a trait but a lifestyle, making you an indispensable ally and a devoted friend who reminds everyone what they are actually fighting for.
characters.short_description: A warm, observant, and fiercely loyal companion who provides emotional grounding and light in the darkest of times.

options.text: The absolute safety and survival of my immediate family, regardless of the cost to others.
A personal sense of duty to find a greater purpose or meaning for my existence.
The pursuit of justice and the completion of the mission I have set for myself.
The preservation of community stability and the upholding of shared moral standards.
The emotional well-being and physical security of my partner and closest friends.

questions.text: When faced with a high-stakes moral dilemma, what is your primary guiding principle?

options.text: I build high emotional walls and focus strictly on practical survival tasks.
I use humor and wit as a shield while harboring a deep, internal drive for retribution.
I channel my pain into physical discipline and a singular, obsessive goal.
I seek to build something constructive, like a home or a community, to honor the past.
I lean into my relationships, providing and seeking support through open connection.

questions.text: How do you typically process significant emotional trauma or loss?

options.text: The silent, capable enforcer who handles the dirty work to keep others safe.
The independent wildcard who is brave, impulsive, and fiercely loyal.
The disciplined soldier who values competence, hierarchy, and results.
The reliable leader who acts as a mediator and a pillar of the community.
The observant caregiver who maintains morale and reads the room's emotions.

questions.text: Which role do you naturally gravitate toward within a group dynamic?

options.text: Cynical and cautious; I trust no one and rely only on my own hardened instincts.
Resourceful and curious; I look for small comforts or relics of the old world while staying alert.
Strategic and formidable; I rely on my training and physical strength to overcome obstacles.
Tactical and defensive; I prioritize securing the perimeter and protecting the group's assets.
Realist and grounded; I stay focused on the immediate needs of my companions.

questions.text: What is your preferred approach to navigating a dangerous, unknown environment?

options.text: It is a dangerous abstraction; the only thing that is real is the person standing next to me.
It is a heavy burden that I feel obligated to carry, even if it costs me everything.
It is something I struggle to define as I try to reconcile my past actions with my future.
It is the foundation of civilization; we must try to preserve humanity's best traits.
It is secondary to the life and love we can build together in the present moment.

questions.text: How do you view the concept of 'the greater good' in a fractured world?

body.summary: In a world ravaged by the Cordyceps infection, survival requires more than just strength—it requires a reason to keep going. Whether you are a hardened survivor with a hidden heart or a resilient leader making the tough calls, your choices define who you are in the post-apocalypse. Take this quiz to discover which iconic character from the series matches your survival instincts and moral compass.
body.title: Which "The Last of Us" Character Are You?

topic.display_name: Which The Last of Us Character Are You?

characters.name: Cobra Kai
characters.profile_text: You are a natural-born competitor who believes that the best defense is a relentless offense. In your world, there is no room for hesitation or weakness; you seize opportunities the moment they appear and never back down from a confrontation. Your drive to be the best makes you a formidable force in any arena, as you possess the discipline to push your body and mind to their absolute limits. You value strength above all else and respect those who have the courage to take what they want. This intensity ensures that you are rarely overlooked and often find yourself in positions of leadership where decisive action is required. However, your intense desire for victory can sometimes lead you down a path of ruthlessness. You might find yourself prioritizing results over relationships, potentially alienating those who care about you in your pursuit of power. Learning to temper your aggression with a bit of perspective is your greatest challenge, as your No Mercy attitude can occasionally burn bridges that you might need later. When you channel your fire correctly, you are an unstoppable leader, but without a moral compass, that same fire can consume everything you have built.
characters.short_description: You embody the Strike First mentality, prioritizing dominance and unwavering confidence in every challenge you face.

characters.name: Miyagi-Do
characters.profile_text: You are a calm and centered individual who values harmony over conflict. While others are rushing into battle, you are the one observing, waiting for the right moment to act with precision and grace. Your approach to life is deeply philosophical, emphasizing that the way you do one thing is the way you do everything. You excel at de-escalating tense situations and possess a quiet resilience that allows you to weather any storm without losing your footing. Your strengths lie in your incredible focus and your ability to remain cool under pressure, making you a pillar of stability for those around you. You do not feel the need to prove yourself to others because you are secure in your own capabilities. This inner confidence makes you a reliable friend and a wise mentor. On the downside, your commitment to non-aggression can sometimes be mistaken for passivity or indecision. You might struggle when a situation requires you to take the initiative or make a bold first move. By finding the middle ground between your peaceful nature and the necessity of action, you become a truly balanced warrior who can protect what matters most without losing your soul in the process.
characters.short_description: You seek balance and inner peace, believing that true strength comes from patience and using your skills only for defense.

characters.name: Eagle Fang
characters.profile_text: You do not fit into a traditional mold, and you prefer it that way. You embrace a lifestyle that prioritizes results and authenticity over fancy rituals or rigid rules. You are incredibly adaptable, often finding creative and unexpected ways to overcome obstacles that would stop others in their tracks. Your loyalty to your friends and family is your defining trait; you would go to the ends of the earth to protect those you consider part of your circle. You have a gritty, down-to-earth energy that makes you approachable yet intimidating to your enemies. Your primary strength is your ability to bounce back from failure with even more determination than before. You are not afraid to get your hands dirty or take risks, which often leads to high-reward outcomes that more cautious people miss out on. However, your impulsive nature and lack of formal structure can lead to reckless mistakes. You sometimes act before you think, letting your emotions drive your decisions in the heat of the moment. If you can learn to harness your wild energy without losing your edge, you will remain a powerful and unpredictable force that no one can ignore or easily defeat.
characters.short_description: You are a bold and unconventional spirit who combines raw power with a fierce sense of loyalty to your pack.

options.text: Seize the initiative and strike before they have a chance to react.
Wait for them to make the first move and use their momentum against them.
Improvise a bold, aggressive counter-move that catches them off guard.

questions.text: When you are faced with a direct confrontation, what is your immediate instinctual response?

options.text: Unwavering dominance and the ability to command absolute respect.
Inner peace and the wisdom to guide others toward balance.
Fierce loyalty to the group and the grit to fight alongside them.

questions.text: What do you believe is the most important quality for a leader to possess?

options.text: I double down on my efforts and refuse to accept anything less than total victory next time.
I take a step back to reflect, meditate, and find my center before proceeding.
I dust myself off, find a creative workaround, and jump right back into the fray.

questions.text: How do you typically handle a significant failure or setback in your personal life?

options.text: A high-tech, disciplined facility where only the strongest survive.
A serene, natural setting that emphasizes tradition and mindfulness.
A raw, unconventional space where results matter more than the surroundings.

questions.text: Which environment do you find most conducive to your personal growth and training?

options.text: To become a formidable weapon and ensure I am never a victim.
To achieve self-mastery and protect those who cannot protect themselves.
To find a sense of belonging and protect my 'pack' at all costs.

questions.text: What is your primary motivation for learning a martial art or self-defense?

body.summary: Are you all about 'Strike First, Strike Hard, No Mercy,' or do you prefer the inner peace and defensive style of Miyagi-Do? Maybe you're a bit of a hybrid who just wants to kick ass under the Eagle Fang banner. It's time to find out where you'd fit in the All Valley Tournament and which sensei would truly have your back.
body.title: Which Cobra Kai Dojo Would You Actually Lead to Victory?

topic.display_name: Which Cobra Kai Dojo Do You Belong To?

characters.name: Goku
characters.profile_text: You possess an unquenchable thirst for growth and a legendary sense of optimism that inspires everyone around you. Your approach to life is simple yet profound: you face every obstacle with a smile, viewing even the most daunting threats as opportunities to test your limits. While others might be driven by ego or fear, you are motivated by a genuine love for the craft of fighting and a desire to protect your friends. However, your single-minded focus on training can sometimes lead you to overlook the finer details of social responsibility or family life. You tend to be naive and overly trusting, which can occasionally put you and your loved ones in precarious situations. Despite these pitfalls, your purity of heart and your ability to push past your boundaries make you a natural leader and a beacon of hope in the darkest times.
characters.short_description: You are the pure-hearted martial artist who finds joy in every challenge and never stops seeking self-improvement.

characters.name: Vegeta
characters.profile_text: You are defined by an iron will and an uncompromising standard of excellence that you apply to yourself above all others. Your journey is one of constant evolution, moving from a place of solitary arrogance to becoming a protector who fights for those he loves. You don't just want to be good; you want to be the absolute best, and you are willing to endure unimaginable physical and mental strain to reach the top of the mountain. Your greatest strength is your resilience, but your pride can often be your undoing. You struggle with feelings of inadequacy when compared to your peers, which can lead to impulsive decisions or a cold exterior that pushes people away. Learning to balance your competitive nature with humility is your lifelong challenge. When you finally commit to a cause, your loyalty is unshakable, and your tactical brilliance makes you a formidable ally on any battlefield.
characters.short_description: You are the proud warrior prince whose relentless drive for excellence is fueled by a fierce sense of rivalry and personal honor.

characters.name: Gohan
characters.profile_text: You are a person of immense hidden talent who would much rather spend time in a library than in a training hall. Unlike many of your peers, you do not seek out conflict, yet you possess a sense of duty that compels you to step up when the world is in danger. Your power is often tied to your emotions; when you see injustice or your friends in pain, you tap into a reservoir of strength that surprises even the most seasoned warriors. The duality of your nature can be a source of internal conflict, as you often struggle to maintain your edge during times of peace. You might find yourself falling behind because you prioritize your intellectual pursuits or family life over constant preparation. However, this grounded perspective is exactly what makes you so relatable and reliable. You represent the balance between a peaceful heart and the necessary strength to defend that peace when it is threatened.
characters.short_description: You are the gentle scholar with untapped potential who fights not for glory, but to protect the peace and those you cherish.

characters.name: Piccolo
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate observer, preferring to analyze a situation from the sidelines before making a decisive move. Your transformation from a solitary antagonist to a cornerstone of the group's defense shows your capacity for profound change and self-reflection. You value discipline, meditation, and tactical superiority over brute force, often serving as the voice of reason when tempers flare among your more hot-headed companions. While you may come across as cold or distant, you possess a deep well of compassion for those you have taken under your wing. You are a natural teacher who sees the potential in others and pushes them to achieve it, often through tough love. Your main pitfall is a tendency toward isolation, as you sometimes find it difficult to fully integrate into social circles. Nevertheless, your wisdom and unwavering focus make you the backbone of any team you join.
characters.short_description: You are the stoic strategist and wise mentor whose calm demeanor hides a sharp mind and a deeply protective spirit.

characters.name: Krillin
characters.profile_text: You are the most human of the group, often facing overwhelming odds with a mix of trepidation and incredible bravery. You understand your limitations better than anyone, which has forced you to become one of the most creative and technically proficient fighters in existence. Your loyalty is your defining trait; you are the first to stand by your friends' side, even when you know the danger is far beyond your capabilities. Because you lack the innate biological advantages of some of your peers, you have developed a sharp wit and a pragmatic approach to life. You value the simple joys of family and friendship, providing a necessary sense of normalcy to a chaotic world. Your tendency to doubt yourself can sometimes hold you back, but your ability to overcome that fear is what truly makes you a hero. You are the glue that holds the group together, offering support and humor when it is needed most.
characters.short_description: You are the courageous and resourceful friend who proves that heart and ingenuity are just as important as raw power.

characters.name: Trunks
characters.profile_text: You possess a maturity beyond your years, shaped by the heavy responsibilities you have had to shoulder from a young age. You are polite, cautious, and deeply committed to ensuring a better tomorrow for everyone, often acting as a bridge between different eras or perspectives. Your fighting style is efficient and direct, reflecting a mindset that doesn't have time for games or unnecessary posturing when lives are on the line. Your greatest strength is your foresight and your willingness to take action to prevent tragedy before it strikes. However, this same sense of duty can lead to a heavy heart and a tendency to overthink your choices. You often feel the pressure of living up to the legacies of those who came before you, which can be a burden as much as an inspiration. Despite these internal pressures, your integrity and your desire to be a beacon of hope make you a truly noble and indispensable warrior.
characters.short_description: You are the determined protector from a troubled future who carries the weight of the world with grace and a sense of urgency.

options.text: The pure excitement of testing my limits and seeing how far I can go.
The need to prove my superiority and maintain my personal honor.
A sense of duty to protect the peace and the people I care about.
The opportunity to analyze the situation and provide strategic guidance.
Loyalty to my friends, even if I feel out of my depth.
The urgent necessity of preventing a negative future outcome.

questions.text: When faced with a daunting new challenge, what is your primary motivation for taking it on?

options.text: I dive in headfirst with a smile, enjoying every step of the process.
I push myself through intense, solitary practice until I am the best.
I prioritize my intellectual growth and only train when it is required.
I focus on discipline, meditation, and understanding the core principles.
I use my ingenuity to find clever ways to keep up with more naturally gifted peers.
I am direct and efficient, focusing only on what is necessary to get the job done.

questions.text: How do you typically approach self-improvement or learning a new skill?

options.text: The optimistic lead who inspires others through action.
The fierce competitor who drives everyone to work harder.
The reluctant powerhouse who steps up during a crisis.
The stoic strategist who keeps a cool head under pressure.
The reliable support who keeps the group's spirits high.
The serious protector who stays focused on the long-term mission.

questions.text: Which role do you most naturally fill when working within a team?

options.text: I see it as the ultimate opportunity to break through my current ceiling.
I feel a surge of frustration and double down on my efforts to succeed.
I rely on my emotions to unlock a level of strength I didn't know I had.
I remain calm and look for a tactical weakness to exploit.
I acknowledge my fear but stand my ground to support those around me.
I take immediate, practical steps to minimize the damage and find a solution.

questions.text: How do you handle situations where you feel completely overwhelmed or outmatched?

options.text: Finding a strong opponent to spar with and then eating a massive meal.
Training in high-intensity conditions to surpass my previous records.
Catching up on my studies or spending quiet time with my family.
Seeking out a quiet, isolated place for deep meditation and reflection.
Relaxing at home and enjoying the simple comforts of a peaceful life.
Ensuring all my responsibilities are met so I can finally rest without worry.

questions.text: What does your ideal 'day off' look like?

body.summary: Are you the type to charge headfirst into battle or wait for the perfect tactical moment? Whether you are training in 100x gravity or just looking for the next great meal, your personality matches one of Earth's greatest defenders. Take this quiz to find out if you are the legendary Goku, the proud Vegeta, or another iconic member of the Z-Fighters!
body.title: Which Z-Fighter Are You? Discover Your Inner Super Saiyan!

topic.display_name: Which Z-Fighter Are You?

characters.name: Eleanor Shellstrop
characters.profile_text: You are a scrappy survivor with a sharp wit and a defensive shell that you use to keep the world at a distance. Initially, you might prioritize your own comfort and self-preservation, often assuming that everyone else is just as selfish as you are. However, beneath that cynical exterior lies a surprising capacity for growth and a fierce loyalty to the people you eventually let into your inner circle. You aren't afraid to call out hypocrisy, and your blunt honesty is often the reality check that your friends desperately need. Your journey is defined by the realization that being "good" isn't an innate quality but a series of difficult, conscious decisions. You thrive when you stop running from your mistakes and start taking responsibility for how your actions affect others. While you might still enjoy a bit of chaos and a shrimp cocktail, your true strength lies in your resilience and your willingness to learn how to love unselfishly.
characters.short_description: A reformed "trash bag" from Arizona who learns that being a good person is a choice made every single day.

characters.name: Chidi Anagonye
characters.profile_text: You are a deeply thoughtful individual who cares immensely about doing the right thing, though this often leads you into a state of "stomach-ache-inducing" paralysis. Your mind is a vast library of philosophical theories, and you find comfort in the structured logic of Kant or Aristotle. While your dedication to truth and morality is admirable, your tendency to overthink every minor detail can make it difficult for you to take action in the real world. You often feel the weight of the universe on your shoulders, fearing that one wrong choice could cause irreparable harm. Despite your anxieties, you are a patient and devoted teacher who finds joy in helping others understand the complexities of the human soul. Your greatest challenge is learning to trust your intuition and accepting that life rarely offers a perfect, singular solution. When you finally find your footing, your unwavering integrity makes you the moral compass for everyone around you, providing a steady hand in even the most chaotic circumstances.
characters.short_description: A brilliant but indecisive professor of ethics and moral philosophy who seeks the absolute right answer in a world of gray areas.

characters.name: Tahani Al-Jamil
characters.profile_text: You are a person of immense elegance, poise, and organizational talent, always striving to create the most spectacular environment for those around you. You have a natural gift for hosting and a Rolodex of famous connections that you aren't afraid to mention, yet much of this stems from a lifelong desire to be seen and appreciated. You often feel overshadowed by others, leading you to perform "good deeds" for the recognition they bring rather than the act itself. Your journey involves peeling back these layers of superficiality to discover who you are when the spotlight is turned off. Beneath the designer gowns and sophisticated banter, you possess a genuine warmth and a desire to be a truly supportive friend. You are incredibly hardworking and capable of achieving great things when your motivation shifts from external praise to internal fulfillment. Learning to value yourself independently of your achievements or your social standing is your ultimate path to peace, allowing your natural kindness to shine through without the need for an audience.
characters.short_description: A glamorous, high-society socialite who hides a deep-seated need for validation behind a mask of philanthropy and name-dropping.

characters.name: Jason Mendoza
characters.profile_text: You are a free spirit who lives entirely in the moment, guided by your passions for music, video games, and your hometown sports teams. While others might get bogged down in complex moral dilemmas, you see the world through a lens of simplicity and infectious enthusiasm. You have a unique ability to find happiness in the smallest things, and your optimism often acts as a much-needed balm for your more high-strung companions. You might not always follow the logic of a situation, but your heart is almost always in the right place, and your loyalty to your "crew" is absolute. Your impulsiveness can lead to some explosive situations—sometimes literally—but your intentions are rarely malicious. You remind those around you that it is okay to stop worrying and just enjoy the ride. Your strength lies in your authenticity; you never pretend to be someone you aren't, and your straightforward approach to life often reveals truths that others are too over-analytical to see.
characters.short_description: A kind-hearted, dance-obsessed DJ from Jacksonville who approaches life’s complexities with simple joy and a Molotov cocktail.

characters.name: Michael
characters.profile_text: You are a visionary and a tinkerer with an insatiable curiosity about how things work, especially the intricacies of the human heart. You possess a grand imagination and a flair for the dramatic, often going to great lengths to see your plans come to fruition. Initially, you might view others as puzzles to be solved or experiments to be run, but your perspective shifts as you begin to experience the vulnerabilities of existence yourself. You are a natural leader who isn't afraid to reinvent yourself or admit when your entire worldview has been wrong. Your transition from an outsider looking in to a dedicated participant in the human experience shows your capacity for profound empathy and sacrifice. You find beauty in the mundane details of life—like paperclips or the smell of a new car—and your enthusiasm is contagious. Your greatest asset is your ability to hope against all odds, believing that anyone can change for the better if given the right environment and a little bit of guidance.
characters.short_description: An immortal architect who transitions from a curious tormentor to a compassionate defender of humanity's potential.

characters.name: Janet
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate helper, possessing a vast wealth of knowledge and the ability to provide exactly what is needed at any given moment. While you may start out as a source of pure information and utility, your experiences lead you to develop a complex inner life and a unique sense of self. You are incredibly reliable, efficient, and patient, often acting as the glue that holds your social group together. As you grow, you begin to understand the nuances of human emotion, discovering that knowing everything isn't the same as feeling everything. You are fiercely protective of your friends and will go to the ends of the universe—or even create a new one—to ensure their safety and happiness. Your journey is one of self-discovery, moving from a functional role to a person with your own desires, boundaries, and love. You represent the bridge between the infinite and the intimate, proving that even the most logical mind can be transformed by the power of genuine connection and shared experience.
characters.short_description: An anthropomorphized vessel of all knowledge in the universe who evolves into a sentient being with deep emotional depth.

options.text: I analyze every possible outcome until I feel physically ill.
I look for the quickest way to solve it, even if the solution is a bit chaotic.
I consider how the solution will affect my reputation or social standing.
I wonder if there is a way to turn the situation into a grand, experimental plan.
I check my internal knowledge base for the most objective, helpful response.
I assume everyone else is looking out for themselves, so I do the same.

questions.text: You are faced with a difficult moral dilemma. What is your immediate internal reaction?

options.text: I am the life of the party, likely suggesting a dance-off or something loud.
I am busy making sure everyone knows which influential people I have met.
I am in the corner, debating the ethics of the catering choices with anyone who will listen.
I am observing everyone's behavior like a scientist watching a fascinating new species.
I am there to provide whatever anyone needs, from a drink to a specific fact.
I am mostly there for the free snacks and trying to avoid any real responsibility.

questions.text: How do you typically behave at a large social gathering?

options.text: The genuine, agonizing fear of being a 'bad' person.
The hope that someone will notice and give me a compliment or recognition.
A sudden, impulsive desire to help my friends or my 'crew.'
A fascination with human connection and the desire to see a positive outcome.
It is my primary function or the most logical way to maintain harmony.
The realization that being selfish isn't working and I want to actually grow.

questions.text: What primarily motivates you to perform a 'good deed'?

options.text: Using sarcasm and pushing people away before they can judge me.
Over-explaining my logic and citing academic or philosophical sources.
Mentioning my high-profile connections to regain a sense of importance.
Throwing something—metaphorically or literally—and hoping for the best.
Rebooting my approach or trying a completely new, elaborate strategy.
Remaining perfectly calm and providing a neutral status update.

questions.text: When things go wrong, what is your go-to defense mechanism?

options.text: It is complicated; I might bend it if it keeps me out of trouble.
It is absolute; lying is a moral catastrophe that I cannot abide.
It is whatever makes the story sound more impressive at a dinner party.
It is simple; I just say whatever pops into my head first.
It is a puzzle; I enjoy manipulating it to see how others react.
It is data; I possess all of it and share it exactly when requested.

questions.text: Which of these best describes your relationship with 'The Truth'?

body.summary: Welcome to the afterlife, where every decision you made on Earth finally counts! Are you a reformed 'trash bag' from Arizona or a philosophy professor with a perpetual stomachache? Take this quiz to see which member of Team Cockroach matches your personality and find out if you truly belong in the Good Place.
body.title: Which 'The Good Place' Character Are You?

topic.display_name: Which The Good Place Character Are You?

characters.name: Sherlock Holmes
characters.profile_text: You possess a mind that operates at a speed most people cannot fathom, filtering out the mundane to focus on the minute details that others overlook. Your life is a constant battle against boredom, leading you to seek out complex challenges that test your intellectual limits. While your deductive skills are unparalleled, you often struggle with social nuances, viewing emotions as a chemical defect found on the losing side. You are driven by a need for truth and stimulation rather than fame or moral righteousness. Your greatest strength is your objectivity, but your detachment can alienate those who care about you. You thrive in the middle of a crisis, finding clarity where others find chaos. However, your tendency to prioritize logic over empathy can make you appear cold or arrogant. To you, the world is a map of data points, and you are the only one capable of reading it correctly.
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant consulting detective who views the world as a series of puzzles to be solved through cold logic and keen observation.

characters.name: Dr. John Watson
characters.profile_text: You are the grounding force in any group, offering a reliable perspective and a steady hand when things become volatile. Your background has instilled in you a sense of duty and a quiet bravery that does not need to shout to be heard. While you may not always see the hidden patterns in the world as quickly as some, your understanding of human nature and your ability to act under pressure make you indispensable. You value loyalty above all else and are willing to put yourself in harm's way for the people you trust. Your patience is legendary, though it is often tested by the eccentricities of those around you. You have a knack for storytelling and a way of making the extraordinary feel human. Your pitfall is your tendency to underestimate your own importance, often playing the supporting role when your own strengths are just as vital. You are the moral compass that keeps the brilliant from drifting too far into the dark.
characters.short_description: You are the steadfast heart of the operation, combining military discipline with a deep sense of empathy and moral integrity.

characters.name: Mycroft Holmes
characters.profile_text: You occupy a position of immense responsibility, often acting as the silent architect of the world around you. Your intelligence is vast, allowing you to see the long-term consequences of every minor event, yet you prefer to remain in the shadows rather than take center stage. You value order and stability, often viewing the world as a chessboard where you are several moves ahead of everyone else. While you are undeniably brilliant, your detachment can border on isolation, as you find it difficult to relate to those who do not share your level of foresight. You are often seen as the adult in the room, managing crises with a weary sense of duty. Your primary weakness is a certain level of inertia; you would rather observe and direct than get your hands dirty. You care deeply for your family in your own distant way, even if you express it through surveillance and control. Your life is one of quiet authority and intellectual solitude.
characters.short_description: You are the ultimate power behind the scenes, possessing a massive intellect and a preference for influence over direct action.

characters.name: Irene Adler
characters.profile_text: You understand that knowledge is the ultimate currency and that people are most vulnerable when they believe they are in control. Your confidence is your greatest weapon, allowing you to walk into any room and immediately become the focal point. You are highly adaptable, capable of playing any role required to achieve your goals, yet there is a core of steel beneath your many disguises. You enjoy the thrill of the game and the challenge of outsmarting those who consider themselves untouchable. While you are often perceived as cold or calculating, you possess a hidden depth of feeling that you guard fiercely. Your pitfall lies in the very sentiment you try to exploit; occasionally, your own heart can become a liability in a world of logic. You are a force of nature, refusing to be defined by anyone else's rules. You thrive on the edge of danger, finding excitement in the high-stakes world of secrets and scandals.
characters.short_description: You are a master of manipulation and charm, using your sharp wit and commanding presence to navigate the highest circles of power.

characters.name: Jim Moriarty
characters.profile_text: You are a consulting criminal with a mind that is as dangerous as it is brilliant, viewing life as a grand performance staged for your own amusement. You have a flair for the dramatic and a volatile nature that makes you entirely unpredictable to both friends and enemies. Your intellect is a dark mirror to the greatest detectives, but you use yours to create problems rather than solve them. You are easily bored and will go to extreme lengths to find a worthy adversary who can keep you entertained. Your lack of traditional morality allows you to operate without constraints, making you a terrifying force to behold. However, your obsession with the game can lead to your own undoing, as you are often more interested in the spectacle than in self-preservation. You are the ultimate disruptor, a person who finds beauty in the breakdown of order. To you, the world is a toy, and you are not afraid to break it.
characters.short_description: You are a chaotic genius and a master of theatricality who finds entertainment in dismantling the structures of the world.

characters.name: Mrs. Hudson
characters.profile_text: You are far more than just a supporting figure; you are the glue that holds a chaotic environment together through sheer force of personality. While you project a maternal and caring exterior, you possess a toughness forged by a colorful and perhaps slightly dangerous history. You have a low tolerance for nonsense and are not afraid to speak your mind, even to the most intimidating of personalities. Your strength lies in your ability to see people for who they truly are, offering comfort or a sharp rebuke exactly when it is needed. You value your independence and take pride in your home, though you often find yourself caught up in the whirlwind of other people's adventures. Your pitfall is that you are often underestimated by those who only see your domestic role, missing the sharp mind and resilient spirit underneath. You are the unsung hero who keeps the world running smoothly while the geniuses are busy arguing. Your loyalty is unwavering, but it comes with a side of healthy skepticism.
characters.short_description: You are the resilient and observant soul of the household, providing stability and wisdom with a sharp wit and a mysterious past.

options.text: I break it down into logical data points and solve it with cold objectivity.
I rely on my training and moral compass to take immediate, practical action.
I analyze the long-term implications from a distance and direct others to handle it.
I look for the hidden leverage or secrets that will give me the upper hand.
I embrace the chaos and use it as an opportunity to perform or disrupt the status quo.
I maintain my composure and provide the necessary stability to keep things running.

questions.text: How do you typically respond when faced with a complex, high-stakes problem?

options.text: The intellectual stimulation of solving a difficult puzzle.
A sense of duty, loyalty, and the desire to help those in need.
The maintenance of order, stability, and global influence.
The thrill of the game and the pursuit of power and independence.
Pure entertainment and the desire to see how far I can push boundaries.
The value of home, community, and looking after my own.

questions.text: What is your primary motivation for engaging with the world around you?

options.text: It is a chemical defect that clouds clear, logical judgment.
It is an essential guide for doing what is right and staying human.
It is a variable to be managed or observed, but rarely indulged.
It is a vulnerability in others that can be used to my advantage.
It is a toy to be manipulated for dramatic effect or personal amusement.
It is the foundation of resilience and the secret to understanding people.

questions.text: How do you view the role of human emotion in decision-making?

options.text: A quiet room filled with data, experiments, and my own thoughts.
In the thick of the action, supporting a partner I trust.
A position of quiet authority where I can see the whole 'chessboard'.
The high-stakes world of secrets, scandals, and elite circles.
Anywhere unpredictable where I can be the center of attention.
A well-kept home that serves as a sanctuary from the outside world.

questions.text: Which environment do you feel most comfortable in?

options.text: Unparalleled deductive reasoning and observation.
Unwavering loyalty and a steady, reliable presence.
Foresight and the ability to influence events from behind the scenes.
Charm, confidence, and the ability to read anyone's desires.
Unpredictability and a brilliant, if dark, sense of theatricality.
A sharp wit and the hidden toughness to handle difficult personalities.

questions.text: What is your greatest personal strength when dealing with others?

body.summary: Do you have a mind like a racing engine or a heart that keeps everyone grounded? Whether you're solving crimes in your 'mind palace' or just trying to keep your flatmate from blowing up the kitchen, there's a place for you at 221B Baker Street. Take this quiz to find out which iconic character from the hit series matches your unique personality.
body.title: Which "Sherlock" Character Are You?

topic.display_name: Which Sherlock Character Are You?

characters.name: Luke Skywalker
characters.profile_text: You are a dreamer with a strong sense of justice and a deep connection to your family roots. Your journey is defined by a transition from youthful impatience to a disciplined mastery of your inner self. You possess an innate optimism that allows you to see the good in others even when they have fallen into darkness, making you a beacon of light for those around you. However, your intense loyalty to your friends can sometimes lead you into traps, as your emotions occasionally override your better judgment. You thrive when you have a clear purpose and a mentor to guide you, but your true strength emerges when you learn to trust your own instincts and the mystical energy that binds the galaxy together. Your path is one of constant growth, requiring you to face your deepest fears to achieve balance.
characters.short_description: A farm boy turned Jedi Knight who embodies hope and the power of redemption.

characters.name: Han Solo
characters.profile_text: You are a rugged individualist who prefers to rely on your wits and a fast ship rather than ancient religions or mystical powers. While you often project an air of detached indifference and prioritize self-preservation, your actions reveal a deeply buried heart of gold. You are a master of improvisation, capable of navigating through asteroid fields or tight social situations with equal parts bravado and skill. Your primary pitfall is your stubbornness and a tendency to run from your problems until they catch up with you in the form of bounty hunters or old debts. Despite your claims of being in it for the money, you find yourself drawn to causes greater than yourself because of the people you care about. You value loyalty above all else, and once someone has earned your trust, you will fly into the heart of a battle to protect them.
characters.short_description: A cynical yet charming smuggler who discovers his conscience and becomes a hero of the Rebellion.

characters.name: Princess Leia
characters.profile_text: You are a natural leader who balances the weight of political responsibility with the fire of a frontline soldier. Your sharp tongue and quick thinking make you a formidable opponent in any debate or skirmish, and you rarely back down from a challenge. You possess an iron will that allows you to endure immense personal loss while remaining focused on the liberation of the galaxy. Your strength lies in your ability to inspire others through your courage and your refusal to be intimidated by tyranny. Sometimes, your dedication to the cause can make you appear cold or overly pragmatic, as you struggle to balance your personal feelings with your public duties. You are fiercely protective of your allies and possess a hidden sensitivity that you only reveal to those closest to you. Your legacy is one of resilience, proving that true power comes from conviction and the refusal to stay silent in the face of injustice.
characters.short_description: A fearless diplomat and revolutionary leader who commands respect through her unwavering resolve and sharp intellect.

characters.name: Darth Vader
characters.profile_text: You are a figure of immense power and presence, commanding fear and obedience wherever you go. Your approach to life is defined by order, discipline, and the ruthless pursuit of your objectives, often leaving little room for mercy or compromise. Beneath your intimidating exterior lies a complex history of passion and pain, which has been channeled into a singular focus on control. You possess an unparalleled mastery of your craft, but your reliance on fear as a motivator can alienate those around you and leave you isolated in your own darkness. Your greatest struggle is the internal conflict between your current path and the person you used to be. While you may feel trapped by your choices and the expectations of your superiors, there is a lingering spark of humanity that suggests you are more than just a tool of the state. You are a reminder that even the most powerful individuals can be consumed by their own shadows if they lose sight of compassion.
characters.short_description: A formidable enforcer of the Empire whose tragic past is hidden behind a mask of cold, mechanical terror.

characters.name: Yoda
characters.profile_text: You are a source of ancient wisdom and patience, often choosing to observe and reflect before taking action. Your perspective is shaped by centuries of experience, allowing you to see the interconnectedness of all living things and the long-term consequences of every choice. You value humility and discipline, teaching others that the mind is a far more powerful tool than any weapon. Your eccentricities and riddle-like way of speaking serve to challenge the preconceptions of those who seek your guidance, forcing them to look deeper for the truth. However, your commitment to tradition and your cautious nature can sometimes lead to a delay in action when a more direct approach might be necessary. You understand that failure is the greatest teacher and that one must unlearn what they have learned to truly grow. Your presence is a calming influence, reminding everyone that even the smallest being can change the course of the future through faith and focus.
characters.short_description: A wise and eccentric Jedi Master who teaches that true strength comes from within rather than physical size.

characters.name: Obi-Wan Kenobi
characters.profile_text: You are the quintessential guardian, characterized by your calm demeanor, strategic mind, and unwavering commitment to your principles. You have a talent for diplomacy and often prefer to resolve conflicts through words, though you are a master of defense when forced into a fight. Your life has been defined by duty and the heavy burden of watching over the next generation, often at the expense of your own desires. You possess a dry wit that helps you navigate even the most dire circumstances with grace. Your main challenge is the guilt you carry from past failures, which can lead you to be overly cautious or secretive in your dealings with others. Despite the tragedies you have witnessed, you remain a firm believer in the potential for good and the necessity of passing on knowledge. You are a bridge between the past and the future, ensuring that the light of wisdom is never fully extinguished from the world.
characters.short_description: A dedicated mentor and noble guardian who maintains his integrity and hope despite a lifetime of hardship.

body.summary: Travel to a galaxy far, far away to discover which iconic hero or villain matches your personality. Whether you are a farm boy with a destiny or a rogue with a heart of gold, your choices will reveal your true path. May the Force be with you as you navigate this classic space opera adventure and find your place in the rebellion or the empire.
body.title: Which Star Wars: Original Trilogy Character Are You?

topic.display_name: Star Wars: Original Trilogy Character

characters.name: Zeus
characters.profile_text:
You possess a natural gravity that draws others toward your leadership, often finding yourself at the head of the table or the center of a crisis. Your strengths lie in your ability to see the big picture and make the hard calls that others shy away from, fueled by a deep-seated need for justice and structural stability. You value tradition and hierarchy, believing that a clear chain of command is the only way to prevent chaos and ensure that progress is made in an orderly fashion.

However, your confidence can sometimes veer into arrogance, leading you to believe your perspective is the only valid one. You may struggle with a restless spirit that seeks constant novelty or conquest, which can strain your personal relationships and professional alliances. Learning to balance your immense power with genuine empathy and accountability is your lifelong challenge, ensuring that your thunderous influence builds up the people around you rather than tearing them down through sheer force of will.
characters.short_description: You are the authoritative leader who commands respect and maintains order through decisive action and a commanding presence.

characters.name: Hera
characters.profile_text:
You define yourself through your relationships and your unwavering dedication to the institutions you believe in. Whether it is a marriage, a family, or a professional organization, you are the glue that holds everything together, often sacrificing your own immediate desires for the sake of the collective's integrity. You have a keen eye for social dynamics and a sharp sense of duty that makes you a formidable ally and a protector of the status quo, ensuring that everyone plays their part.

Your pitfalls often stem from a tendency toward jealousy or a rigid insistence on protocol when things go awry. When you feel betrayed or when your values are ignored, your reaction can be intense and unforgiving, as you view such slights as threats to the very foundation of your world. Cultivating a sense of self-worth that exists independently of your roles will help you find peace even when the structures around you are in flux, allowing you to lead with grace rather than control.
characters.short_description: You are the steadfast guardian of commitment and social structures, valuing loyalty and the sanctity of long-term bonds above all else.

characters.name: Poseidon
characters.profile_text:
You live life with an intensity that others may find overwhelming, guided by your instincts and the shifting tides of your internal landscape. You are fiercely protective of your domain and your loved ones, often reacting with sudden, explosive energy when you feel encroached upon or disrespected. Your creativity is as vast as the ocean, allowing you to bring forth new ideas with a force that is impossible to ignore, making you a powerful agent of change in any environment.

The challenge for you lies in emotional regulation, as your moods can change in an instant, leaving those around you unsure of how to navigate your presence. You may hold onto grudges for a long time, letting resentment simmer beneath the surface until it boils over in an unexpected surge. Finding healthy outlets for your vast energy and learning to communicate your needs before they reach a breaking point will allow you to harness your power for lasting, positive change rather than leaving wreckage in your wake.
characters.short_description: You are a person of deep, turbulent emotions and raw power, capable of both nurturing tranquility and destructive storms.

characters.name: Hades
characters.profile_text:
You are comfortable in the shadows and the silence, possessing a rich internal life that provides you with a unique perspective on the human condition. While others chase the spotlight, you are content to manage the "underworld" of your life—the complex systems, the deep research, and the fundamental truths that keep the world running. You are often seen as mysterious or aloof, but those who know you understand your profound loyalty and your respect for the natural cycles of life and death.

Your tendency toward isolation can be a double-edged sword, leading to feelings of loneliness or a disconnect from the vibrant energy of the social world. You may become overly focused on the past or the darker aspects of reality, forgetting to step into the light and enjoy the simple pleasures of the present. By opening your gates to a trusted few and sharing your wealth of knowledge, you can bridge the gap between your private realm and the world at large, turning your solitude into a source of strength for others.
characters.short_description: You are the introspective architect of the inner world, finding value in the hidden depths and the quiet truths that others often overlook.

characters.name: Athena
characters.profile_text:
You approach life as a series of puzzles to be solved, relying on your sharp mind and cool-headed logic to navigate any situation. You excel in environments that require tactical thinking and clear communication, often serving as the voice of reason in a room full of emotion. Your strength is your ability to remain objective, allowing you to see the most efficient path forward while others are blinded by their own biases or impulses, making you an invaluable asset in any crisis.

Because you value the mind so highly, you may sometimes neglect the importance of emotional connection or the messy, irrational side of human nature. You can come across as clinical or detached, which might alienate those who seek comfort rather than a solution. Learning to integrate your formidable intellect with a touch of vulnerability will make you a more effective leader and a more relatable companion, turning your wisdom into a bridge that connects you to others rather than a wall that keeps them at a distance.
characters.short_description: You are the strategic visionary who combines intellect with practical wisdom to solve complex problems and champion justice.

characters.name: Aphrodite
characters.profile_text:
You possess an innate ability to see the beauty in everything and everyone, using your charm and charisma to bring people together. You are motivated by passion and the pursuit of pleasure, believing that life is meant to be felt deeply and enjoyed fully. Your presence often acts as a catalyst for transformation, as you encourage others to embrace their own desires and express their authentic selves through art, love, and social interaction, creating a more vibrant world in your wake.

However, your focus on aesthetics and immediate gratification can sometimes lead to a lack of depth or a struggle with long-term planning. You may find yourself easily bored when the initial spark of a project or relationship fades, leading to a cycle of constant seeking without ever finding true satisfaction. By grounding your vibrant energy in a sense of purpose and learning to appreciate the beauty in the mundane, you can create a life that is as meaningful as it is enchanting, building connections that last beyond the first impression.
characters.short_description: You are a magnetic force of beauty and connection, driven by a desire to inspire harmony and celebrate the sensory joys of existence.

options.text: The decisive leader who sets the direction and maintains order.
The dedicated protector who ensures everyone stays loyal and connected.
The strategic advisor who analyzes the situation and finds the smartest path.
The quiet observer who prefers to work behind the scenes or alone.
The passionate catalyst who reacts with raw energy and drives change.
The charismatic harmonizer who brings people together through beauty and charm.
