options.text: Analyze the data and research the root cause to find a logical solution.
Step forward immediately to take physical action and protect those at risk.
Gather everyone together to ensure consensus and maintain social harmony.
Look for ways to minimize your own needs to ensure resources go to the most vulnerable.
Speak the uncomfortable truth about the situation, even if it causes friction.

questions.text: When faced with a complex problem that affects your entire community, what is your first instinctual response?

options.text: Ignorance or the inability to understand how things work.
Cowardice or letting fear dictate your choices.
Selfishness or putting your own desires above the group's welfare.
Deception or withholding the truth to protect your reputation.
Cruelty or disrupting the peace and happiness of others.

questions.text: Which of these personal failings do you find most unacceptable in yourself?

options.text: Through rigorous debate and the presentation of verifiable facts.
By everyone being completely transparent about their motives and feelings.
Through compromise, forgiveness, and a focus on collective well-being.
By deferring to the needs of others and avoiding self-assertion.
Through a test of strength or a bold demonstration of leadership.

questions.text: In your ideal social environment, how are disagreements typically resolved?

options.text: A legacy of innovation, discovery, and expanded human knowledge.
A legacy of bravery and the protection of the weak.
A legacy of kindness, joy, and artistic expression.
A legacy of absolute integrity and unwavering honesty.
A legacy of humble service and total self-sacrifice.

questions.text: What kind of legacy do you most hope to leave behind?

options.text: Engaging in a high-adrenaline activity or exploring a dangerous new place.
Studying a new subject or mastering a difficult skill.
Volunteering your time anonymously to help those in your neighborhood.
Gardening, playing music, or enjoying a meal with a large group of friends.
Engaging in a public forum or debate to clarify important social issues.

questions.text: If you were given a day of complete freedom, how would you most likely spend it?

body.summary: In a society divided by virtue, where do your loyalties truly lie? Are you brave enough for Dauntless or selfless enough for Abnegation? Take this quiz to discover which faction matches your personality before the Choosing Ceremony begins!
body.title: Which Divergent Faction Do You Actually Belong In?

topic.display_name: Which Divergent Faction Would You Join?

characters.name: Gomez Addams
characters.profile_text: You are a whirlwind of energy and optimism, approaching every day as if it were a grand adventure. Your devotion to your loved ones is legendary, and you express your affection with grand gestures and unyielding loyalty. You likely possess a wide range of eclectic hobbies, from fencing to high-stakes investments, and you find joy in the most unconventional places. Your zest for life is infectious, making you the heart of any social circle you inhabit. However, your impulsive nature and tendency to get swept up in the moment can sometimes lead to chaotic situations. You might overlook practical details in favor of a grand vision, and your intense enthusiasm can be overwhelming for those who prefer a quieter pace. Despite this, your genuine kindness and unwavering support for your family and friends make you a pillar of strength and a source of constant inspiration. You believe that life is meant to be lived at full volume, and you never shy away from a chance to celebrate the macabre or the magnificent.
characters.short_description: You are the charismatic, eccentric patriarch who lives life with boundless passion and a flair for the dramatic.

characters.name: Morticia Addams
characters.profile_text: You possess a refined and sophisticated nature, often finding beauty in things that others might find macabre or unsettling. Your calm demeanor is your greatest strength, allowing you to navigate life's challenges with grace and poise. You are deeply intuitive and observant, often understanding the needs and desires of those around you before they even speak. Your loyalty to your family is absolute, and you provide a steady, nurturing influence that keeps everyone grounded. Your pitfalls may include a tendency toward detachment or a preference for solitude that others might mistake for coldness. You might find it difficult to relate to more conventional perspectives, which can lead to a sense of isolation. Nevertheless, your unique aesthetic and unwavering self-assurance make you a captivating and influential figure, respected for your wisdom and your ability to find tranquility in the darkest of times. You move through the world with a quiet confidence, knowing that true elegance comes from being entirely yourself, regardless of how strange that self may seem to others.
characters.short_description: You are the elegant, composed matriarch who exudes a mysterious charm and maintains a serene presence amidst chaos.

characters.name: Wednesday Addams
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by your intense focus and your refusal to conform to societal expectations. You value truth above all else, often delivering blunt observations with a deadpan delivery that can be both unsettling and hilarious. Your interests likely lean toward the historical, the scientific, or the slightly morbid, and you approach your passions with a rigorous, disciplined mindset. You are fiercely independent and self-reliant, rarely seeking approval from others and standing firm in your convictions. On the downside, your emotional distance can make it challenging for others to connect with you on a deeper level. You might struggle with vulnerability, viewing it as a weakness rather than a human necessity. Your tendency to be overly critical of yourself and others can also lead to friction in your relationships. Yet, your unwavering integrity and sharp intellect make you a formidable presence, capable of seeing through pretense and finding meaning in the shadows. You are a reminder that there is power in silence and that the most profound insights often come from looking where others are afraid to stare.
characters.short_description: You are the sharp-witted, stoic daughter who values intellectual honesty and possesses a dark, dry sense of humor.

characters.name: Pugsley Addams
characters.profile_text: You are a person of action, always looking for the next project or experiment to dive into. You have a high tolerance for risk and a natural curiosity about how things work, often taking things apart just to see if you can put them back together or make them explode. Your resilience is remarkable; you bounce back from setbacks with a grin, viewing every failure as a learning opportunity. You are a loyal companion, always ready to join in on a sibling's scheme or a friend's adventure. Your main challenge lies in your lack of foresight and a tendency to act before thinking through the consequences. This impulsivity can lead to physical mishaps or social misunderstandings. You might also struggle with focus, jumping from one interest to another without fully mastering any of them. Despite these tendencies, your genuine enthusiasm and lack of malice make you a lovable and energetic presence who brings a sense of fun and unpredictability to every situation. You remind everyone that life is a playground, and that a little bit of danger only makes the game more interesting.
characters.short_description: You are the adventurous, resilient son who enjoys hands-on experimentation and possesses a playful, if slightly dangerous, spirit.

characters.name: Uncle Fester
characters.profile_text: You are a true original, comfortable in your own skin and completely unbothered by what others think of your unusual habits. You have a child-like wonder and a penchant for the spectacular, often finding delight in simple pleasures like a well-timed explosion or a static shock. Your generosity is boundless, and you are always willing to go to great lengths to help those you care about, even if your methods are a bit unconventional. You possess a surprising amount of hidden knowledge and a quirky wisdom that often catches people off guard. However, your lack of social boundaries can sometimes make others uncomfortable, and your intense focus on your own interests can lead you to neglect the needs of those around you. You might also struggle with consistency, as your moods and interests can shift as rapidly as a lightning strike. Regardless, your infectious laughter and your ability to find light in the darkness make you an essential and beloved part of your community. You teach others that being different is not just okay, but a source of immense joy and creative power.
characters.short_description: You are the eccentric, light-hearted relative who finds joy in the bizarre and possesses a truly unique perspective on the world.

options.text: Being the life of the party, greeting everyone with boundless enthusiasm.
Observing the room with a calm, mysterious, and elegant presence.
Staying in the shadows, offering blunt and witty critiques of the crowd.
Finding a hands-on activity or a way to stir up some playful trouble.
Entertaining others with bizarre stories or unusual physical tricks.

questions.text: How do you typically behave at a social gathering?

options.text: Charging in with a sword and a flair for the dramatic.
Maintaining total composure while intuitively finding a solution.
Analyzing the situation with cold logic and a disciplined mindset.
Diving into the problem head-first to see what happens when you tinker with it.
Approaching the chaos with a light-hearted laugh and a unique perspective.

questions.text: When faced with a sudden crisis, what is your first instinct?

options.text: Engaging in high-energy hobbies like fencing or grand romantic gestures.
Tending to a collection of exotic plants or enjoying a quiet, refined atmosphere.
Conducting a scientific experiment or studying a dark historical period.
Building a mechanical contraption or testing out a new, slightly dangerous invention.
Searching for strange artifacts or experimenting with static electricity.

questions.text: Which of these activities sounds like the most fulfilling way to spend an afternoon?

options.text: Through grand, passionate declarations and unwavering loyalty.
With a steady, nurturing presence and a deep understanding of their needs.
By being fiercely honest and protecting them with your sharp intellect.
By inviting them to join you on a wild and unpredictable adventure.
Through quirky, unexpected gifts and a shared sense of the bizarre.

questions.text: How do you express your affection for those closest to you?

options.text: A zest for life and the courage to live it at full volume.
Grace, poise, and the ability to find beauty in the unconventional.
Integrity, independence, and the power of a sharp, focused mind.
Resilience, curiosity, and the thrill of a new challenge.
A sense of wonder and the freedom to be entirely yourself.

questions.text: Which of these traits do you consider your greatest strength?

body.summary: Step into the macabre world of 0001 Cemetery Lane to discover where you fit in this delightfully kooky clan. Whether you prefer the gloom of a graveyard or the thrill of a well-placed trap, your personality holds the key to your Addams identity. Take this quiz to find out if you are a romantic lead, a stoic mastermind, or a chaotic force of nature.
body.title: Which Iconic Addams Family Member Matches Your Spooky Soul?

topic.display_name: Which Addams Family Member Are You?

characters.name: Blair Waldorf
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate strategist, possessing a sharp intellect and a relentless drive to achieve your goals. You believe that power is something to be seized and maintained through discipline and high standards. While others might see you as intimidating or overly competitive, your close circle knows that your loyalty is unwavering and your heart is fiercely protective of those you love. You thrive in structured environments where your taste for elegance and tradition can shine. Your pitfalls often involve a struggle with insecurity and a tendency to over-analyze every social interaction. You find it difficult to let go of control, often feeling that if you aren't the one pulling the strings, everything will fall apart. Learning to trust others and embrace vulnerability is your greatest challenge, but your resilience ensures you always come out on top.
characters.short_description: The ambitious, meticulous queen bee who values tradition, loyalty, and a perfectly executed plan.

characters.name: Serena van der Woodsen
characters.profile_text: You possess a natural charisma that draws people toward you without you even trying. Life seems to unfold for you in a series of serendipitous moments, and you prefer to follow your heart rather than a rigid set of rules. You value freedom and spontaneity, often acting on impulse to seek out new experiences or help a friend in need. Your warmth and approachability make you a beloved figure in any social circle, yet you often struggle with the weight of expectations placed upon you. Your main challenge lies in your tendency to run away from problems rather than facing them head-on. Because things often come easily to you, you may find it difficult to commit to a long-term path or deal with the consequences of your more reckless decisions. You crave authenticity in a world of artifice, constantly searching for a place where you can simply be yourself without the spotlight.
characters.short_description: The magnetic, free-spirited "It Girl" who navigates life with effortless charm and a desire for genuine connection.

characters.name: Chuck Bass
characters.profile_text: You are a person of immense depth and intensity, often projecting an image of stoic indifference to protect yourself from hurt. You have a taste for the finer things in life and a business acumen that rivals the most seasoned professionals. While you may initially appear cynical or self-serving, your actions are frequently driven by a profound need for belonging and a desire to prove your worth to those you respect. You are capable of great sacrifice for the people you truly care about, though you often express your affection through grand gestures rather than words. Your pitfalls include a self-destructive streak and a fear of intimacy that can push people away just when you need them most. You often feel the need to carry the world on your shoulders, struggling to forgive yourself for past mistakes. Finding redemption and learning that you are worthy of love is your lifelong journey, requiring you to lower your guard and let someone in.
characters.short_description: The enigmatic and complex mogul who hides a deeply loyal and sensitive soul beneath a veneer of decadence and power.

characters.name: Nate Archibald
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by your integrity, kindness, and a strong sense of justice. Often caught between the expectations of your upbringing and your own personal desires, you strive to be a "good man" in a world that frequently rewards ruthlessness. You are a loyal friend who values honesty above all else, often acting as the moral compass for those around you. You prefer a life of simplicity and genuine passion over the complicated schemes and power plays that occupy your peers. Your greatest strength is your ability to see the best in people, even when they don't see it in themselves. However, this optimism can sometimes lead to naivety, making you susceptible to being used by those with less noble intentions. You may find yourself feeling adrift when your internal values clash with external pressures, leading to periods of indecision. Your growth comes from learning to stand firm in your convictions and realizing that you don't have to please everyone to be successful.
characters.short_description: The dependable and principled "Golden Boy" who strives to forge his own path despite the pressures of family and status.

characters.name: Dan Humphrey
characters.profile_text: You are a natural storyteller with a keen eye for detail and a sharp, often self-deprecating sense of humor. As someone who often feels like an observer rather than a participant, you possess a unique perspective on the social dynamics around you. You value intellect, literature, and authenticity, often feeling a sense of disdain for the superficiality of high society while simultaneously being drawn to its allure. You are hardworking and ambitious, using your talents to carve out a space for yourself where you previously felt unwelcome. Your pitfalls often involve a sense of moral superiority and a tendency to judge others before truly knowing them. Your desire to belong can sometimes lead you to compromise your own values or engage in the very behaviors you criticize in others. You struggle with the duality of your identity, caught between your humble roots and the glamorous world you've entered. Finding a balance between your ambitions and your integrity is key to your personal fulfillment.
characters.short_description: The observant and intellectual outsider who uses his wit and perspective to navigate and critique the world of the elite.

options.text: Meticulously planning every detail and ensuring everyone follows my lead.
Relying on my natural charm and letting things fall into place effortlessly.
Using my resources and influence to make a bold, decisive move.
Working hard and staying true to my principles, even if it takes longer.
Observing the situation from the outside and using my wit to find an opening.

questions.text: When you want to achieve a specific goal, what is your primary strategy?

options.text: I immediately design a counter-scheme to regain control of the narrative.
I try to distance myself from the drama and hope it blows over.
I retreat into my own world and project an image of total indifference.
I face the situation head-on and try to do the most honorable thing.
I analyze the hypocrisy of the situation and perhaps use it as inspiration.

questions.text: How do you typically react when a major scandal or conflict threatens your reputation?

options.text: Unwavering loyalty and a shared commitment to high standards.
A deep, authentic connection that feels free and unconstrained.
Someone who can see past my defenses and accept my complexities.
Honesty, simplicity, and a lack of complicated social games.
Intellectual compatibility and a shared perspective on the world.

questions.text: What do you value most in your closest relationships?

options.text: The strategist and leader who keeps the group organized.
The magnetic 'It Person' who everyone wants to be around.
The enigmatic figure who provides resources and protection.
The dependable friend who acts as the group's moral compass.
The observant storyteller who notices the details others miss.

questions.text: Which role do you naturally occupy within your social circle?

options.text: The fear of losing control or failing to meet my own expectations.
The desire to run away from responsibilities and just be free.
A self-destructive streak that emerges when I feel vulnerable.
Feeling torn between family expectations and my own personal values.
The tension between wanting to belong and feeling superior to the scene.

questions.text: What is your biggest internal struggle when navigating high-pressure environments?

body.summary: Grab your designer headband and prepare for a scandal because the Upper East Side is calling your name. From high-stakes schemes at Constance Billard to secret rendezvous at the Palace Hotel, your lifestyle choices define your social rank. Are you the reigning Queen Bee or the mysterious outsider looking in? It is time to reveal your true identity—XOXO, Gossip Girl.
body.title: Which 'Gossip Girl' Socialite Are You?

topic.display_name: Which 'Gossip Girl' Socialite Are You?

characters.name: School of the Wolf
characters.profile_text: You embody the classic image of a monster hunter, prioritizing versatility and a strong moral compass even in a world of gray. Your training at Kaer Morhen has instilled in you a deep sense of camaraderie and a reliance on the fundamentals of the trade. You are not one for flashy displays or unnecessary cruelty; instead, you approach every contract with a professional blend of steel, silver, and the essential Witcher signs. Your greatest strength lies in your ability to adapt to any situation, using your environment and your well-rounded skills to overcome even the most daunting odds. However, your loyalty to your brothers and your adherence to a personal code can sometimes lead you into conflicts that others might simply walk away from. You tend to carry the weight of the world on your shoulders, often feeling a sense of responsibility for those who cannot protect themselves. While your stoic nature serves you well in battle, it can make it difficult for you to form deep connections outside of your fellow witchers. You are a survivor, a protector, and a symbol of a dying breed that refuses to go quietly into the night.
characters.short_description: You are a versatile and adaptable warrior who values brotherhood and the pragmatic balance of swordplay and signs.

characters.name: School of the Cat
characters.profile_text: You are a whirlwind on the battlefield, relying on your incredible reflexes and lightweight equipment to dance around your enemies. Unlike other schools, you do not shy away from the more political or morally ambiguous aspects of your profession, often taking contracts that others might find distasteful. Your fighting style is aggressive and relentless, focusing on critical strikes and bleeding wounds that wear down your opponents before they even realize the danger they are in. You value your independence above all else, often operating as a lone wolf even among your own kind. This independence can sometimes border on instability, as the mutations of your school are known to affect the emotional state of its members more intensely. You might find yourself prone to sudden bursts of temper or a cold detachment that unnerves those around you. Your preference for light armor makes you vulnerable if a strike actually lands, requiring you to maintain absolute focus at all times. Despite these risks, your lethality is unmatched, and you move through the shadows with a grace that is as beautiful as it is deadly.
characters.short_description: You are a swift, agile, and often unpredictable combatant who prioritizes speed and precision over brute force.

characters.name: School of the Bear
characters.profile_text: You are a mountain of a warrior, favoring the protection of heavy plate and the crushing power of a massive blade. Your philosophy is simple: if you can survive the hit, you can win the fight. You possess an incredible amount of stamina and physical strength, allowing you to engage in prolonged battles that would exhaust a lesser witcher. You are often seen as the most solitary of the schools, hailing from the frigid peaks of Skellige where the environment is as harsh as the monsters you hunt. You do not care for speed or finesse when a single, well-placed blow can end a conflict. Your reliance on heavy gear means you are less mobile than your peers, which can be a disadvantage against faster, more agile opponents. You tend to be blunt and direct in your interactions, lacking the diplomatic touch that some of the other schools cultivate. This can lead to a reputation for being cold or unapproachable, but those who know you understand that your silence is born of a deep, inner focus. You are the ultimate tank, a relentless force of nature that stands firm against the tide of darkness, no matter how high it rises.
characters.short_description: You are a stoic and resilient powerhouse who relies on heavy armor and sheer endurance to outlast any foe.

characters.name: School of the Griffin
characters.profile_text: You represent the most refined and intellectual branch of the witcher profession, placing a heavy emphasis on the use of magic and tactical preparation. Your training involves a deep study of bestiaries and ancient lore, allowing you to exploit the specific weaknesses of your prey with surgical precision. You view yourself not just as a slayer of monsters, but as a protector of civilization, often adhering to a code of honor that mirrors the knights of old. In combat, you are a master of signs, weaving complex magical patterns into your swordplay to control the battlefield and incinerate your foes. Your focus on the arcane can sometimes lead to an air of superiority or a detachment from the gritty reality of the common folk. You might spend more time in a library than in the field, which can make you appear out of touch with the immediate needs of those you serve. While your magical prowess is formidable, you can become over-reliant on your signs, potentially leaving you vulnerable if your energy is depleted or if you face an anti-magic field. Nevertheless, your dedication to knowledge and your disciplined approach to the craft make you one of the most respected and effective witchers in the world.
characters.short_description: You are a scholarly and noble warrior who masters the arcane arts of Witcher signs and values the traditions of knightly virtue.

characters.name: School of the Viper
characters.profile_text: You are a master of assassination and stealth, preferring to end a fight before it even truly begins. Your style is characterized by the use of short blades and a deep knowledge of alchemy, specifically the creation of deadly poisons that can bring down even the largest beasts. You are often viewed with suspicion by other witchers due to your school's history of taking contracts on humans as well as monsters. You move with a serpentine grace, striking from the shadows and disappearing before your presence is even noted. For you, the end always justifies the means, and you have little room for sentimentality in your work. This pragmatic outlook can make you appear ruthless or even villainous to those who value traditional honor. You are a master of deception and psychological warfare, often using your environment and your opponent's own fears against them. However, your solitary nature and the secretive history of your school can leave you without allies when you need them most. You walk a thin line between a necessary evil and a cold-blooded killer, but your effectiveness is undeniable. You are the hidden blade in the dark, the silent death that no one sees coming until it is far too late.
characters.short_description: You are a cunning and lethal specialist who utilizes dual blades and potent toxins to eliminate targets with cold efficiency.

characters.name: School of the Manticore
characters.profile_text: You represent the ancient roots of the witcher profession, hailing from the distant east and maintaining the original techniques of the craft. Your strength lies in your incredible tolerance for toxicity and your mastery of the laboratory. You rarely enter a fight without a cocktail of mutagens and potions coursing through your veins, granting you superhuman strength, vision, and healing. Your equipment is functional and sturdy, designed for long journeys across harsh deserts and rugged terrain. You are a survivor who understands that preparation is the key to victory, and you never underestimate the power of a well-timed elixir. Your heavy reliance on alchemy means that you are often at your most vulnerable when caught off guard or without your supplies. The constant strain of high toxicity on your body can also lead to long-term physical and mental fatigue, making you appear more weathered and weary than your years might suggest. You tend to be a traditionalist, sometimes struggling to adapt to the changing political landscape of the Northern Kingdoms. Despite these challenges, your deep connection to the origins of the witchers gives you a unique perspective and a resilience that few can match. You are a living testament to the science and sacrifice that created your kind.
characters.short_description: You are a traditionalist and an alchemical expert who relies on a vast array of potions and decoctions to enhance your physical capabilities.

options.text: Adapt my style mid-fight, using a balanced mix of swordplay and basic magic.
Utilize extreme speed and precision to strike at vital points before they can react.
Don heavy protection and outlast them through sheer physical endurance.
Maintain distance and use advanced magical signs to control the battlefield.
Use stealth and debilitating toxins to weaken them before the first blow.
Consume specialized mutagens to push my physical limits beyond natural capacity.

questions.text: When facing a superior opponent, what is your primary tactical instinct?

options.text: I value the bond of brotherhood and a shared sense of professional duty.
I am a lone wolf who values independence, even if it makes others uneasy.
I prefer isolation in harsh environments, relying only on my own strength.
I see myself as a noble protector of civilization, guided by knightly virtues.
I am a pragmatic specialist who takes the contracts others find distasteful.
I am a traditionalist who respects the ancient, scientific roots of my craft.

questions.text: How do you view your relationship with your peers and the wider world?

options.text: A reliable silver blade and the fundamental signs of the trade.
Lightweight gear that allows for maximum mobility and reflex speed.
Thick, reinforced armor and a massive weapon that hits with crushing force.
Extensive knowledge of bestiaries and mastery of arcane energy.
Dual short blades and a collection of lethal, fast-acting poisons.
A vast array of alchemical potions, decoctions, and oils.

questions.text: Which tool is most essential to your survival during a hunt?

options.text: I try to find a professional, pragmatic balance between conflicting interests.
I follow my instincts, even if they lead to sudden or volatile actions.
I remain stoic and blunt, focusing only on the immediate task at hand.
I adhere to a strict code of honor and intellectual discipline.
I prioritize the most efficient outcome, regardless of how others perceive it.
I rely on my preparation and the established traditions of my predecessors.

questions.text: What is your typical reaction to a high-pressure, morally ambiguous situation?

options.text: Versatility; I can adapt to any monster or environment I encounter.
Unpredictability; I move with a lethal grace that keeps foes off-balance.
Resilience; I can take a hit that would kill others and keep fighting.
Tactical Brilliance; I use my environment and magic with surgical precision.
Cunning; I use psychological warfare and deception to end fights quickly.
Fortitude; my body is a laboratory capable of handling extreme toxicity.

questions.text: What do you consider your greatest strength in the heat of battle?

body.summary: The Path is long, dangerous, and filled with monsters that want to eat you for breakfast. Whether you prefer the brute force of a bear or the calculated grace of a cat, your training defines your survival. Take this quiz to discover which legendary Witcher school matches your combat style and moral code.
body.title: Which Witcher School Would You Actually Survive Training In?

topic.display_name: Which Witcher School Do You Belong To?

characters.name: Zeus
characters.profile_text: You possess an innate sense of authority that draws others to your side, often finding yourself in the center of every major decision. Your presence is electric, marked by a sharp intellect and a drive for justice that can sometimes border on stubbornness. You value order and tradition, believing that someone must hold the reins to keep the world from spinning into chaos. While your confidence is your greatest asset, it can occasionally manifest as pride, making it difficult for you to admit when you are wrong or to ask for help from your peers. In your personal life, you strive for excellence in everything you do, pushing yourself to meet the lofty standards set by your heritage. You are fiercely protective of your reputation and your loved ones, though you may struggle with the isolation that often comes with being at the top. Learning to balance your desire for control with the need for genuine connection is your lifelong challenge. When you harness your power correctly, you are an unstoppable force for good, capable of inspiring entire groups to achieve the impossible.
characters.short_description: You are a natural-born leader who commands respect and carries the weight of high expectations with a regal air.

characters.name: Poseidon
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your fluid nature and your intense emotional depth, often acting on instinct rather than rigid logic. Like the sea, you can be calm and nurturing one moment and a raging storm the next, making you a formidable ally and a terrifying opponent. Your loyalty is your most defining trait; you would go to the ends of the earth for those you care about, often disregarding rules or personal safety in the process. This impulsiveness is both your greatest strength and your most significant pitfall, as it can lead you into dangerous situations without a clear exit strategy. You tend to feel like an outsider, comfortable in your own skin but never quite fitting into the strict hierarchies of the world. You have a natural affinity for nature and a dry sense of humor that helps you navigate even the darkest times. While you may struggle with authority figures who try to contain your spirit, your ability to adapt to any environment makes you incredibly resilient. By embracing your inner strength and learning to channel your passions, you become a beacon of hope for those who feel lost at sea.
characters.short_description: You are a free-spirited and unpredictable individual whose loyalty to friends is as deep and vast as the ocean.

characters.name: Hades
characters.profile_text: You often find yourself on the fringes of social circles, possessing a depth of character that many people find intimidating or difficult to read. You are comfortable with silence and solitude, using your time to reflect on the complexities of life and the inevitability of change. Your perspective is grounded in a harsh realism that allows you to see through facades and identify the core truths of any situation. While others might see you as gloomy, you simply possess a unique appreciation for the cycles of existence and the value of things that are often overlooked. Your strengths lie in your resilience and your unwavering sense of duty, even when your efforts go unacknowledged by the world at large. You are a keeper of secrets and a guardian of the forgotten, showing a surprising amount of compassion to those who have been cast aside. However, your tendency to withdraw can lead to feelings of bitterness or isolation if you do not make an effort to connect with the living world. When you open up, you offer a level of loyalty and insight that is rare, proving that there is great beauty to be found in the shadows.
characters.short_description: You are a misunderstood soul with a quiet intensity and a profound understanding of the things others fear to face.

characters.name: Athena
characters.profile_text: Your mind is your greatest weapon, constantly analyzing data and searching for the most efficient path to victory. You approach every challenge with a cool head and a library of knowledge, believing that preparation is the key to overcoming any obstacle. You have a deep respect for history, architecture, and the arts, often finding inspiration in the great works of the past. Your peers look to you for guidance because they know your advice is rooted in logic and foresight, making you the ultimate tactician in both battle and everyday life. While your intelligence is undeniable, you may struggle with the emotional nuances of human interaction, sometimes appearing cold or overly critical to those who do not share your drive for perfection. You have a hard time letting go of control and can become frustrated when things do not go according to your meticulously crafted plans. Learning to appreciate the beauty of spontaneity and the value of mistakes is essential for your growth. When you combine your brilliant intellect with a touch of empathy, you become a visionary leader capable of building a better future for everyone.
characters.short_description: You are a strategic mastermind who values wisdom, craftsmanship, and the power of a well-executed plan above all else.

characters.name: Apollo
characters.profile_text: You possess a vibrant energy that is hard to ignore, often excelling in various fields ranging from music and poetry to sports and medicine. You have a natural gift for expression and a desire to be seen, thriving in environments where you can showcase your skills and uplift others. Your optimism is infectious, and you have a knack for finding the silver lining in even the darkest clouds. You value honesty and clarity, often acting as a bridge between conflicting parties through your diplomatic nature and your ability to see the truth in any situation. However, your desire for validation and your competitive streak can sometimes lead to arrogance or a fear of failure. You may find it difficult to handle criticism, as you tie much of your self-worth to your accomplishments and the way others perceive you. It is important for you to remember that your value is not just in your talents, but in the warmth and light you provide to those around you. By staying grounded and focusing on the joy of the process rather than just the applause, you can truly fulfill your potential as a source of inspiration and healing.
characters.short_description: You are a multi-talented individual who shines in the spotlight, bringing warmth, creativity, and healing to everyone you meet.

characters.name: Ares
characters.profile_text: You are driven by a powerful inner fire that pushes you to confront challenges head-on without hesitation. You value strength, physical prowess, and the thrill of competition, often finding your greatest sense of purpose in the heat of a struggle. You are not one to back down from a fight, and your directness ensures that everyone knows exactly where you stand. While some may find your intensity overwhelming, your friends know that you are a reliable protector who will always have their backs when things get tough. Your impulsive nature and quick temper can sometimes lead to unnecessary conflict, as you tend to act first and think later. You may struggle with feelings of restlessness or a need to prove yourself, which can result in a cycle of aggression if not properly channeled. Learning to master your emotions and recognize that true strength often involves restraint is your greatest hurdle. When you direct your passion toward a worthy cause, you become an unstoppable champion, capable of breaking through any barrier and leading your allies to a hard-won victory.
characters.short_description: You are a fierce competitor with a bold spirit and the courage to fight for what you believe in, no matter the odds.

options.text: Analyze the data and construct a multi-step strategic plan.
Trust my intuition and adapt my actions as the situation evolves.
Take immediate, direct action to confront the obstacle head-on.
Assume a leadership role and delegate tasks to ensure order.
Look for a creative or unconventional solution that others missed.
Observe from the sidelines to identify the most efficient path.

questions.text: When faced with a complex problem, what is your primary instinctual approach?

options.text: A high-energy stage or social gathering where I can express myself.
A quiet, secluded space where I can reflect in peace.
A library or workshop filled with tools and information.
The open air, preferably near a vast body of water.
A competitive arena where I can test my physical limits.
A formal setting where I feel in control of my surroundings.

questions.text: Which of these environments do you find most restorative for your energy?

options.text: Unwavering loyalty to my inner circle, regardless of the rules.
The pursuit of wisdom and the mastery of my craft.
The courage to stand my ground and fight for my beliefs.
The responsibility to lead and maintain justice for the group.
The ability to see the truth and bring light to others.
A deep sense of duty and resilience in the face of hardship.

questions.text: What do you consider to be your most defining personal value?

options.text: I feel a surge of competitive energy and defend my position fiercely.
I provide a logical rebuttal supported by facts and evidence.
I am genuinely surprised and may become stubborn to protect my pride.
I tend to withdraw and process the challenge internally before responding.
I use humor or charm to de-escalate the tension and find common ground.
I react impulsively, often letting my emotions guide my response.

questions.text: How do you typically react when your authority or ideas are challenged?

options.text: The Visionary: Setting the goals and inspiring the team.
The Architect: Designing the structure and the fine details.
The Enforcer: Ensuring the work gets done and obstacles are cleared.
The Specialist: Providing unique talents or creative flair.
The Wildcard: Bringing a fresh, unpredictable perspective.
The Anchor: Staying grounded and handling the difficult, unseen tasks.

questions.text: Which of these roles do you naturally gravitate toward in a group project?

body.summary: Ever felt like you don't quite fit in with the mortals? It's time to discover your divine lineage and claim your bunk at Half-Blood Hill. Whether you're a child of the sea or a master of the forge, your destiny awaits. Take this quiz to find out which Olympian god is your godly parent!
body.title: Which Camp Half-Blood Cabin Do You Truly Belong In?

topic.display_name: Which Half-Blood Hill Cabin Is Yours?

characters.name: The Mastermind
characters.profile_text: You possess an analytical mind that thrives on complexity, allowing you to see the entire board while others focus on individual pieces. Your primary strength lies in your ability to anticipate every possible variable, from security patrol rotations to the psychological profiles of your team members. You spend weeks or months researching targets, identifying vulnerabilities that others overlook, and crafting contingency plans for every conceivable setback. You are the one who defines the objective and ensures that every specialist knows their exact role and timing. However, your reliance on logic and foresight can sometimes lead to a sense of detachment or overconfidence in your own designs. You may struggle when faced with truly chaotic, unpredictable human elements that fall outside your calculated models. While you are the glue that holds the crew together, your tendency to keep secrets and maintain a need-to-know basis can occasionally breed mistrust among those who are putting their lives on the line for your vision. You must balance your desire for control with the reality that even the best plans require a degree of flexibility and trust in your team's autonomy.
characters.short_description: You are the architect of the operation, responsible for the intricate planning and strategic oversight required to execute a flawless score.

characters.name: The Hacker
characters.profile_text: You operate in the realm of code and signals, serving as the eyes and ears of the operation from behind a screen. Your expertise allows you to disable silent alarms, loop camera feeds, and unlock biometric scanners with a few keystrokes. You prefer the quiet precision of a remote terminal to the physical risks of the field, finding comfort in the logical structure of computer systems. Your ability to think several steps ahead in the digital landscape ensures the team remains invisible to law enforcement and security personnel during the most critical phases of the job. Your greatest pitfall is a potential over-reliance on technology and a lack of physical situational awareness. If a system is air-gapped or uses analog failsafes, you may find yourself sidelined or frustrated by the limitations of your tools. You often feel a sense of intellectual superiority over those who rely on brute force, which can lead to friction within the group. Despite this, your role is indispensable in a modern world where the most valuable assets are protected by layers of encryption and sophisticated firewalls. You are the invisible hand that makes the impossible entry look like a simple walk in the park.
characters.short_description: You are the digital ghost of the team, manipulating networks and bypassing electronic security to clear a path for your colleagues.

characters.name: The Safecracker
characters.profile_text: You possess a rare combination of patience, technical knowledge, and sensory intuition. Whether dealing with a vintage mechanical dial or a modern electronic keypad, you understand the inner workings of locking mechanisms better than the people who designed them. You thrive under the immense pressure of a ticking clock, maintaining a calm demeanor while the rest of the team watches the door. Your work is a form of art, requiring a delicate touch and an ear for the subtle clicks that signal success. You are the one who finally touches the prize, making you the focal point of the heist's climax. Because your role is so specialized, you may feel like a one-trick pony when the plan goes sideways and requires improvisation outside of your niche. You are often a perfectionist, which can lead to dangerous delays if you become obsessed with a particularly stubborn mechanism. Your preference for working in silence and isolation can make you seem distant or unapproachable to your teammates. However, your reliability in the high-pressure moment of the crack makes you the heartbeat of any successful vault heist, as without you, the entire operation is merely a break-in without a payoff.
characters.short_description: You are the precision specialist whose steady hands and acute senses can defeat the most sophisticated physical security measures in existence.

characters.name: The Getaway Driver
characters.profile_text: You view the city as a grid of possibilities, knowing every alleyway, shortcut, and traffic pattern by heart. Your relationship with your vehicle is symbiotic; you understand its limits and how to push them to the absolute edge without breaking. While the rest of the crew is inside the target, you are outside, monitoring police scanners and maintaining a state of hyper-vigilance. Your reflexes are unparalleled, and your ability to maintain composure during a high-speed pursuit is what keeps the team out of prison. You are the final link in the chain, responsible for the transition from the crime scene to safety. Your primary challenge is the inherent risk of your position, as you are often the first point of contact for law enforcement during an escape. You may have a reckless streak or a need for speed that can cloud your judgment in low-stakes situations. Because you spend much of the heist waiting, you can become restless or anxious, potentially leading to premature movements that alert the authorities. However, your loyalty is absolute, and you take personal responsibility for the safety of every person in your vehicle. You are the one who ensures that the hard-earned loot actually makes it to the hideout.
characters.short_description: You are the master of movement and timing, ensuring the team escapes the scene and disappears before the authorities can close the perimeter.

characters.name: The Grifter
characters.profile_text: You understand that the weakest link in any security system is the human element. With a silver tongue and a wardrobe of disguises, you can talk your way past guards, gain the trust of high-level executives, and create diversions that draw attention away from the real crime. You are a chameleon, capable of adopting any persona required to facilitate the heist, whether it is a high-rolling investor or a lowly maintenance worker. Your strengths lie in your emotional intelligence and your ability to read people’s desires and fears in real-time. The danger of your role is that you may begin to lose yourself in your various identities, or find it difficult to turn off the manipulation when dealing with your own team. You often operate on the edge of discovery, where a single slip of the tongue could compromise the entire mission. This constant performance can be mentally exhausting, leading to burnout or a cynical view of human nature. Despite these risks, your ability to bypass physical barriers through sheer charisma makes you the ultimate wildcard. You prove that sometimes the easiest way through a locked door is simply to be invited in by the person holding the key.
characters.short_description: You are the master of deception and social engineering, using charm and manipulation to infiltrate secure areas without firing a shot.

characters.name: The Muscle
characters.profile_text: You are the team’s insurance policy, trained to handle the unpredictable and violent aspects of a high-stakes job. Your presence alone is often enough to maintain order, but when things turn sour, you have the skills to neutralize threats quickly and efficiently. You excel in high-adrenaline environments, possessing a tactical mindset that allows you to secure perimeters and manage hostages with professional discipline. You value loyalty and strength above all else, serving as the physical shield for your more specialized teammates who lack your combat training. Your main pitfall is the tendency to see every problem as a nail that requires a hammer. In situations that demand subtlety or diplomacy, your instinct for direct action can escalate a conflict unnecessarily and draw unwanted attention. You may also feel undervalued if the heist goes perfectly and your skills are never called upon, leading to a sense of boredom or frustration during the planning phases. Nevertheless, you are the backbone of the operation, providing the security and peace of mind that allow the others to focus on their specific tasks. You are the one who ensures that if the plan fails, the team still has a fighting chance to get out alive.
characters.short_description: You are the enforcer and tactical expert, providing the physical presence and combat proficiency needed to control a room and protect the crew.

options.text: Systematic analysis of the entire structure to identify logical flaws.
Exploitation of digital vulnerabilities or network protocols.
Precise manual manipulation of physical or mechanical components.
Social engineering and the manipulation of interpersonal dynamics.
Tactical application of physical presence or direct force.
Optimization of spatial navigation and kinetic timing.

questions.text: When encountering a complex obstacle, which primary methodology do you employ to resolve it?

options.text: By mentally recalculating variables and contingency plans.
By narrowing focus to sensory feedback and mechanical precision.
By relying on hyper-vigilance and rapid motor reflexes.
By adopting a deceptive persona to manage external perceptions.
By establishing physical dominance and securing the immediate perimeter.
By maintaining remote situational awareness through data streams.

questions.text: How do you maintain operational efficiency under extreme time constraints and high-pressure stakes?

options.text: A centralized command hub with comprehensive data oversight.
An isolated digital interface or encrypted network environment.
A confined space requiring intricate technical tool usage.
A dynamic urban landscape requiring high-speed navigation.
A public social setting requiring high emotional intelligence.
A high-risk tactical zone requiring defensive proficiency.

questions.text: In which professional environment do you demonstrate the highest level of specialized competence?

options.text: The lack of integrated strategic oversight and coordination.
The inherent flaws in software architecture and firewalls.
The material limitations of physical barriers and locking mechanisms.
The predictability of transit routes and response patterns.
The psychological biases and susceptibility of the human element.
The absence of sufficient physical deterrents and combat readiness.

questions.text: What do you identify as the most significant vulnerability in a sophisticated security system?

options.text: The flawless execution of a multi-phase strategic blueprint.
The undetected infiltration and manipulation of a secure network.
The successful defeat of a high-security physical vault.
The safe extraction of the team through a high-risk perimeter.
The successful acquisition of access through social deception.
The maintenance of total environmental control during a crisis.

questions.text: Which outcome provides the most valid metric of your professional success?

body.summary: Every successful job requires a specialized crew with distinct skill sets and nerves of steel. From the mastermind behind the blueprint to the getaway driver waiting in the shadows, your personality determines where you fit in the operation. Take this quiz to discover your essential function in the ultimate high-stakes score.
body.title: What Is Your Role in a High-Stakes Heist?

topic.display_name: What Is Your Role in a High-Stakes Heist?

characters.name: Dominic Toretto
characters.profile_text:
You are a natural leader who commands respect through actions rather than words, possessing a moral code that is as rigid as it is protective. Your strength lies in your unwavering commitment to those you love, often acting as the anchor for your group during times of chaos. You value tradition, loyalty, and the roar of a high-performance engine, believing that there is nothing more important than the bond of blood and chosen family. You lead by example, showing that true power comes from the heart.

However, your intense focus on protection can sometimes manifest as a stubborn refusal to let others in or a tendency to take the weight of the world on your shoulders. You might struggle with vulnerability, preferring to maintain a tough exterior even when facing internal turmoil. While your "ride or die" mentality is your greatest asset, it can also lead you into dangerous situations where you prioritize honor over safety, trusting your instincts to navigate the most treacherous roads. You are the rock upon which your family is built.
characters.short_description: You are the stoic, fiercely loyal patriarch who lives life a quarter-mile at a time and puts family above all else.

characters.name: Brian O'Conner
characters.profile_text:
You possess a unique blend of technical precision and raw intuition, making you a formidable presence behind the wheel and in high-stakes situations. Your journey is defined by a transition from following the rules to following your heart, proving that loyalty is earned through shared experiences and mutual respect. You are adaptable and quick-thinking, often serving as the bridge between different worlds while maintaining a cool, collected demeanor under pressure. You have a natural talent for finding the fastest line through any obstacle.

Your greatest strength is your ability to see the good in people and your willingness to risk everything for a cause you believe in. Yet, this same idealism can sometimes lead to internal conflict when your duties clash with your personal convictions. You might find yourself constantly chasing the next thrill or the next way to prove your worth, but ultimately, your heart belongs to the quiet moments with the people who truly know you. You are a brother in every sense of the word, defined by your integrity.
characters.short_description: You are a former outsider who found a true home through speed, skill, and an unbreakable bond with your chosen brothers.

characters.name: Letty Ortiz
characters.profile_text:
You are the definition of resilience, having faced countless challenges and emerged stronger every time. Your skills as a driver and a fighter are unmatched, fueled by a sharp mind and a refusal to back down from any threat. You do not suffer fools and you value honesty above all else, expecting the same level of grit and dedication from those around you that you demand of yourself. You are the person who stays in the fight long after others have given up.

While your exterior is hardened by experience, you possess a deep well of emotion that you only share with those who have earned your trust. Your independence is a point of pride, but it can occasionally make it difficult for you to ask for help when you need it most. You are a warrior at heart, always ready to jump into the fray, but your ultimate goal is finding a sense of peace and belonging in a world that is constantly trying to tear things apart. Your loyalty is absolute, and your spirit is unbreakable.
characters.short_description: You are a fearless, street-smart survivor who is as tough as nails and fiercely protective of the people you love.

characters.name: Mia Toretto
characters.profile_text:
You are often the voice of reason in a group of high-octane personalities, using your sharp intellect and deep empathy to navigate complex family dynamics. While you may not always be the one behind the wheel in a high-speed chase, your contributions are vital to the team's success and survival. You possess a quiet strength that allows you to hold everything together when things fall apart, acting as a strategist and a nurturer in equal measure. You see the big picture when others are blinded by the adrenaline.

Your challenge lies in balancing your desire for a peaceful, stable life with the chaotic reality of your family's lifestyle. You are fiercely protective of your children and your partner, often making difficult sacrifices to ensure their safety. Though you might sometimes feel sidelined by the more explosive members of the crew, your influence is the glue that prevents the family from fracturing, proving that true power often lies in the bonds of love and understanding. You are the moral compass that keeps everyone headed in the right direction.
characters.short_description: You are the compassionate heart of the family, providing the emotional foundation and intelligence that keeps everyone grounded.

characters.name: Tej Parker
characters.profile_text:
You are the person everyone turns to when a problem seems unsolvable, bringing a sophisticated understanding of electronics, mechanics, and strategy to the table. Your calm, analytical approach allows you to dismantle obstacles with surgical precision, often while maintaining a dry sense of humor that keeps the mood light. You value efficiency and innovation, always looking for the next upgrade or the cleverest shortcut to achieve your goals. You are the architect of the team's most complex operations, ensuring every gear turns perfectly.

Despite your intellectual prowess, you are a reliable friend who knows when to put the gadgets aside and step up for the team. Your pitfall might be a tendency to overthink things or rely too heavily on technology when raw instinct is required. However, your ability to remain objective and focused in the heat of the moment makes you an indispensable asset, ensuring that the family always has the tools and the plan they need to succeed. You are the brains of the operation, always thinking three steps ahead.
characters.short_description: You are the brilliant technical mastermind who uses your wit and technological expertise to stay three steps ahead of the competition.

characters.name: Roman Pearce
characters.profile_text:
You have a personality that fills the room, using your wit and bravado to mask your nerves and keep your friends entertained. While you might complain about the danger or the absurdity of a plan, you are always there when it counts, proving that your loyalty is just as strong as your sense of humor. You have a knack for improvisation and a survival instinct that has pulled you out of more than a few tight spots, often with a sarcastic comment to spare. You bring the energy and the laughs to every mission.

Your biggest challenge is your occasional lack of focus and a tendency to let your ego get the better of you, which can lead to friction with more serious-minded teammates. You might struggle with being taken seriously, but those who know you best understand that your lightheartedness is a vital defense mechanism. Underneath the jokes and the flash, you are a dedicated member of the family who will go to the ends of the earth to protect your friends, even if you complain the whole way there. You are the heart and the humor of the crew.
characters.short_description: You are the charismatic, fast-talking joker who brings humor and unexpected bravery to every high-stakes mission.

options.text: Take charge and set a clear strategy for everyone to follow.
Look for a technical or unconventional workaround using logic.
Keep the mood light with humor to ease the collective tension.
Focus on keeping everyone safe and emotionally united.
Jump straight into the fray to handle the problem physically.
Rely on your gut instincts and adapt as the situation evolves.

questions.text: When your group faces a major obstacle, what is your immediate instinct?

options.text: Unwavering loyalty and a deep respect for tradition.
Integrity and the courage to do what is right, even if it's hard.
Grit, resilience, and the ability to hold their own in a fight.
Empathy and a nurturing spirit that keeps the group grounded.
Intelligence and a sharp, analytical mind for solving puzzles.
High energy, charisma, and a great sense of humor.

questions.text: What do you value most in a teammate or close friend?

options.text: I become a rock—unshakable, stoic, and intensely focused.
I get a rush and find my performance actually improves under pressure.
I get aggressive and push through any barrier in my way.
I stay composed and consider the long-term consequences for everyone.
I detach from the chaos and focus purely on the data and mechanics.
I talk my way through it, using bravado to mask my nerves.

questions.text: How do you typically handle a high-stakes, adrenaline-pumping situation?

options.text: Hosting a large backyard BBQ for my closest friends and family.
Tinkering with a complex project or upgrading my gear.
Driving on the open road with no specific destination in mind.
Being the center of attention at a high-energy social gathering.
Testing my physical limits in a competitive or gritty environment.

questions.text: Which of these best describes your ideal way to spend a free afternoon?

options.text: My sense of duty and my role as a protector.
My ability to bridge different worlds and connect with anyone.
My sheer refusal to ever give up or stay down.
My emotional intelligence and ability to see the big picture.
My capacity to solve complex problems others can't even see.
My ability to improvise and find a way to survive anything.

questions.text: What do you consider to be your greatest personal strength when things get tough?

body.summary: Buckle up and grab a Corona because it’s time to see where you fit in the crew. Whether you live your life a quarter-mile at a time or you're the tech genius behind the screens, every family needs a driver. Take this quiz to find out if you're the leader, the muscle, or the heart of the team.
body.title: Which Member of the 'Fast' Family Are You?

topic.display_name: Which Member of the 'Fast' Family Are You?

characters.name: John Wick
characters.profile_text: You are defined by an unbreakable resolve and a reputation that precedes you in every room. When you set your mind to a task, you pursue it with a terrifying efficiency, utilizing your environment as a weapon and your past experiences as a shield. You value loyalty and peace above all else, yet you find yourself constantly pulled back into the fray by a sense of duty or a need for justice. Your strength lies in your endurance; you can take a hit and keep moving forward, turning your pain into a catalyst for action. However, your greatest pitfall is your inability to truly let go of the life you left behind. Your commitment to your principles often puts you at odds with powerful institutions, making you a target for those who fear your influence. You prefer a direct approach, relying on your mastery of close-quarters combat and tactical precision to navigate the most impossible odds.
characters.short_description: You are the legendary "Baba Yaga," a man of singular focus and sheer will who finishes what others cannot.

characters.name: Sofia Al-Azwar
characters.profile_text: You possess a sharp, commanding presence and a tactical mind that excels in high-stakes environments. Your leadership is not just about giving orders but about standing on the front lines with those you trust, especially your highly trained dogs who act as an extension of your own will. You are fiercely protective of your domain and your history, often balancing a cold professionalism with a deep-seated passion for those you consider family. Your combat style is fluid and aggressive, emphasizing teamwork and environmental awareness to overwhelm your enemies before they can react. Your strength is your unwavering loyalty and your ability to manage complex logistics under fire. However, your tendency to hold onto old debts and personal grudges can sometimes cloud your judgment, leading you into conflicts that might have been avoided. You thrive when you have a clear objective and a loyal team at your side, making you a formidable ally and a lethal adversary.
characters.short_description: You are a fierce and loyal manager of the Casablanca Continental who commands respect through authority and your bond with your canine companions.

characters.name: Caine
characters.profile_text: You move through the world with a grace and precision that defies your physical limitations, relying on sound and vibration to map your surroundings. Your approach to combat is almost musical, a rhythmic dance of strikes and parries that leaves your opponents bewildered and defeated. You possess a dry wit and a pragmatic outlook on life, often viewing your profession as a necessary burden rather than a source of pride. Your strength lies in your sensory mastery and your ability to remain calm in the center of a storm, using your perceived weakness as a deceptive advantage. You are a man of deep personal honor, often caught between your love for your family and the demands of the High Table. This internal conflict is your primary pitfall, as you are frequently forced to make impossible choices that test your morality. You prefer the shadows and the subtle click of a cane to the roar of gunfire, proving that true power comes from within.
characters.short_description: You are a blind master of the blade who navigates the world through heightened senses and a weary, philosophical approach to violence.

characters.name: Cassian
characters.profile_text: You represent the gold standard of the assassin world, combining technical proficiency with a sophisticated sense of etiquette. You treat your targets with a level of respect that is rare in your profession, viewing every contract as a formal engagement rather than a mindless slaughter. Your combat style is disciplined and methodical, favoring high-caliber weaponry and tactical positioning to ensure a clean finish. You are a man of your word, and your reputation for reliability makes you one of the most sought-after operatives in the business. Your strength is your composure; even in the heat of a duel, you maintain a level head and a sharp eye for your opponent's weaknesses. However, your rigid adherence to the rules and your sense of professional rivalry can sometimes lead you into unnecessary risks. You struggle when faced with opponents who do not play by the same rules, as your sense of honor can be exploited by those with less integrity. You are at your best when engaged in a fair fight, where your skill and dedication can truly shine.
characters.short_description: You are a consummate professional and a man of honor who views your work as a craft governed by a strict code of conduct.

options.text: Improvise with whatever object is closest to me, no matter how mundane.
Use a tactical distraction or call upon a loyal ally to create an opening.
Rely on my senses to find the rhythm of the room and wait for the perfect strike.
Use disciplined technique and positioning to find a structural weakness in my opponent.

questions.text: When backed into a corner with no weapons, what is your first instinct?

options.text: Sheer will and the internal need to finish what I have started.
Unwavering loyalty to my pack and the protection of my domain.
A weary sense of duty to protect my family's future at any cost.
A commitment to the professional craft and the established code of conduct.

questions.text: What is the primary driver behind your actions in a high-stakes situation?

options.text: They are obstacles in the way of my objective that must be removed.
They are threats to my inner circle that must be neutralized aggressively.
They are participants in a necessary but exhausting dance of violence.
They are fellow professionals who deserve a level of formal respect.

questions.text: How do you view your relationship with your opponents?

options.text: Anywhere I can use the surroundings to my advantage through sheer grit.
A territory I have prepared and control, supported by those I trust.
A space where sound and vibration tell the whole story of the conflict.
A formal setting where tactical positioning and high-caliber tools are key.

questions.text: Which environment do you feel most effective in?

options.text: I ignore the rules entirely and do whatever it takes to survive and win.
I protect my own interests and hold those who broke the rules accountable.
I adapt to the chaos while maintaining my own internal philosophical balance.
I am frustrated by the lack of honor but maintain my own rigid standards.

questions.text: How do you handle a situation where the rules of your world are being broken?

body.summary: Step into the high-stakes world of the Continental and discover where you fit in the High Table's hierarchy. Whether you rely on tactical precision, sheer willpower, or a loyal canine companion, every hitman has a signature style. Answer these questions to find out if you are a legendary Baba Yaga or a rising star in the global underworld.
body.title: Which 'John Wick' Assassin Matches Your Killer Instinct?

topic.display_name: What Kind of John Wick Assassin Are You?

characters.name: Executive
characters.profile_text: You are a creature of the glass towers, thriving in an environment where information is the most valuable currency and loyalty is a line item on a balance sheet. Your life is defined by luxury, precision, and the constant pressure of maintaining your status within the corporate hierarchy. You possess an unparalleled ability to manipulate systems from the inside, using your connections and resources to achieve goals that others can only dream of. However, this life of privilege comes at a cost, as you are always one bad quarterly report away from being discarded by the very machine you serve. Your strengths lie in your strategic mind and your access to high-end technology and intel. You prefer the clean, sterile aesthetic of the upper districts, where the air is filtered and the chaos of the streets is just a distant blur. While you are adept at negotiation and corporate warfare, you may struggle when forced to operate outside of your structured environment. Your greatest pitfall is the isolation that comes with power; in a world where everyone is a competitor, finding someone you can truly trust is nearly impossible.
characters.short_description: You navigate the high-stakes world of corporate boardrooms, wielding influence and capital as your primary weapons.

characters.name: Street Kid
characters.profile_text: You grew up in the shadow of the megastructures, learning early on that the only people you can rely on are your chosen family and your own instincts. You know every back alley, every black-market dealer, and every unspoken rule of the concrete jungle. Your life is a constant hustle, driven by a desire for respect and the need to stay one step ahead of the law and the gangs. You have a natural charisma and a street-smart intuition that allows you to read people and situations with uncanny accuracy, making you a formidable survivor in the neon-lit chaos. Your preferences lean toward the raw and the authentic, finding beauty in the graffiti-covered walls and the vibrant energy of the night markets. You are fiercely loyal to your community, often putting yourself at risk to protect those who have stood by you. However, your deep-seated distrust of authority and your tendency to solve problems with quick fixes can lead you into dangerous confrontations. Your primary challenge is breaking free from the cycle of poverty and violence that defines the streets, as the city always seems to demand a price for every small victory you achieve.
characters.short_description: You are a product of the urban sprawl, possessing the grit and local knowledge needed to survive in the city's toughest neighborhoods.

characters.name: Nomad
characters.profile_text: You find your freedom in the vast, dusty expanses of the outskirts, where the rigid laws of the corporations hold no sway. For you, life is about the bond of the pack and the roar of a well-tuned engine, valuing honor and self-sufficiency above all else. You are a master of improvisation, capable of repairing complex machinery with scrap parts and navigating treacherous terrain that would swallow a city-dweller whole. Your perspective is shaped by the horizon, giving you a sense of scale and a connection to the natural world that those trapped in the urban hive have long since forgotten. Your strengths are your resilience and your unwavering commitment to your family, who provide a safety net in a hostile world. You prefer the rugged utility of nomadic gear and the honesty of a life lived under the open sky. Despite your independence, you may feel like an outsider when forced to enter the claustrophobic urban centers, where your straightforward nature clashes with the deception of city life. Your greatest pitfall is the vulnerability of your lifestyle; without the protection of the clan, you are a lone target in a world that increasingly seeks to fence off the wild places you call home.
characters.short_description: You belong to the open road and the tight-knit clans that roam the desolate badlands beyond the city walls.

options.text: A sleek, climate-controlled boardroom overlooking the city lights.
The neon-soaked chaos of a crowded urban night market.
The wide-open, dusty expanse of the desert outskirts.

questions.text: Where do you feel most in your element within the world of the dark future?

options.text: Institutional power, high-end tech, and legal contingencies.
Street-smarts, local connections, and knowing the back alleys.
The loyalty of my clan and a reliable, fast-moving vehicle.

questions.text: What is your primary source of security when things get dangerous?

options.text: Leverage information and corporate pressure to force a favorable deal.
Use my charisma and reputation to hustle for a trade on the street.
Rely on self-sufficiency or trade mechanical skills and scrap.

questions.text: How do you typically handle a situation where you need something from a rival?

options.text: Ascending the corporate ladder to achieve ultimate status and wealth.
Earning the respect of my neighborhood and surviving the hustle.
Maintaining total freedom and protecting the honor of my family.

questions.text: What does 'success' look like to you in Night City?

options.text: Call my legal department and let the bureaucracy handle it.
Fade into the urban sprawl where the law can't follow.
Pack up the camp and move across the border before they arrive.

questions.text: When the authorities start asking questions, what is your first move?

body.summary: Night City is a place of neon dreams and chrome nightmares, but your origin story is what truly defines your survival. Are you a high-flying executive with a taste for power, a street-smart hustler with local connections, or a free-spirited wanderer from the Badlands? Plug in and find out which path you were born to walk in the dark future.
body.title: Which Cyberpunk Lifepath Is Your True Calling?

topic.display_name: Which Cyberpunk Lifepath Would You Choose?

characters.name: Achilles
characters.profile_text: You possess an intensity that few can match, driven by a desire for eternal glory and a refusal to accept anything less than total respect. Your strengths lie in your absolute dedication to your craft and your raw, emotional power, which makes you a formidable force in any arena. You are not one for half-measures; when you commit to a cause or a person, you do so with your entire soul, often leading to legendary achievements that others can only dream of. However, your greatest pitfall is your volatile temper and a tendency toward pride that can isolate you from your peers. You often struggle to balance your personal desires with the needs of the collective, and your sensitivity to perceived slights can lead to deep-seated resentment. Learning to temper your rage with empathy is your greatest challenge, as your brilliance is often shadowed by the darkness of your own stubbornness.
characters.short_description: You are the peerless warrior of the Iliad, defined by your unmatched martial prowess and a burning, uncompromising sense of personal honor.

characters.name: Odysseus
characters.profile_text: You rely on your wits far more than your brawn, navigating life's complexities through cleverness, adaptability, and a deep understanding of human nature. You are a natural problem-solver who views every obstacle as a puzzle to be solved, often finding unconventional solutions that others overlook. Your resilience is your greatest asset, allowing you to endure years of hardship while keeping your ultimate goal firmly in sight. You value family and heritage above all else, and your loyalty to your roots provides the compass for your long journeys. On the flip side, your penchant for deception and your curiosity can sometimes lead you into unnecessary danger. You may find yourself overthinking situations or manipulating others to achieve your ends, which can strain your relationships. While your versatile nature makes you a survivor, it also means you occasionally struggle with being straightforward, as you are always looking three steps ahead of everyone else in the room.
characters.short_description: You are the master strategist and silver-tongued traveler known for your cunning intellect and your relentless drive to return home.

characters.name: Heracles
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your incredible capacity for hard work and your ability to shoulder burdens that would crush anyone else. You possess a rugged, down-to-earth nature and a directness that people find both intimidating and admirable.
